• Can help keep triglycerides at a healthy level

By allowing ingested fat to be broken down into triglycerides, these can be used by the body for energy production. Lipase also enhances nutrient absorption.

• Can help reduce symptoms of excess stomach acid

• May soothe gastrointestinal mucosa

• Helps to relieve digestive discomfort

• May provide relief after certain foods like coffee, spices or fried food

The active ingredient in this formula can offer protection against excess acid produced in the stomach which can cause irritation and the symptoms associated with it. Rhizinate™ Fructose Free contains deglycyrrhizinated liquorice, a safe form of liquorice root which can be used long term to improve digestive issues. Rhizinate™ contains less than 1% glycyrrhizin which may elevate blood pressure in some individuals.

product.title: Similase - 180 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description:

• Can help the body absorb nutrients from food

• Helps break down carbohydrates, protein and fat

• Can withstand pH ranges across the digestive system

Similase® is a proprietary blend of microbial enzymes that are active across a broad pH range in the gastrointestinal tract. As a result, Similase® provides support of carbohydrate, protein, fat, and fibre digestion. Dairy free formula which does not contain any preservatives or artificial colourings.

product.title: Zinc Carnosine - 60 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
Zinc Carnosine provides 72 mg of zinc l-carnosine containing 16mg of elemental zinc. Zinc Carnosine is an antioxidant supplement and supports a healthy inflammatory response.

Modern living is hard on the intestinal lining. The consumption of acidic, sugary, and inflammatory foods and drinks can be hard for our body to process. With constant exposure to harsh chemicals, food compounds, and microbes, the mucosal lining that protects our stomach and intestines can become damaged. When this happens, you may experience digestive tract and intestinal issues.

Zinc and carnosine are beneficial to the gastrointestinal tract both separately as well as synergistically. Zinc l-carnosine is made up of the trace element zinc bonded to l-carnosine.

  • Zinc contributes to the normal function of the immune system
  • Zinc contributes to the maintenance of normal testosterone levels in the blood
  • Zinc contributes to normal protein synthesis
  • Zinc contributes to normal metabolism of vitamin A
  • Zinc contributes to normal metabolism of fatty acids
  • Zinc contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism
  • Zinc contributes to normal carbohydrate metabolism
  • Zinc contributes to normal acid-base metabolism
  • Zinc contributes to normal DNA synthesis
  • Zinc has a role in the process of cell division
  • Zinc contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress

product.title: Clinical GI Microbiotic - 60 Capsules | NOW Foods
product.description:
We have changed the name of this product because the European Commission has banned the use of the word Probiotic in the product name. We regret this decision and apologize for this.

Clinical GI Probiotic™ has been formulated to benefit the over 50, as levels of good bacteria can start to decline as we age.

  • Helps to improve regularity
  • May offer relief for minor bloating
  • Helps to support the immune system.
  • Can benefit overall gut health
  • Contains strains known to colonise the gut
  • Contributes to healthy microbiome balance

As we age the number of healthy bacteria in our guts begins to decline, creating an imbalance that can be detrimental for immune function and digestive health. The strains used in this formula can colonise the GI tract to support regularity and better bowel formation. Adults over 50 can begin to experience digestive discomfort due to the lower numbers of beneficial microorganisms in their gut. The probiotics in this supplement include Bifidobacterium lactis HN019™ which clinical research links to better immune system function and better digestion in adults over 50, and contains 20 billion CFU per daily intake.

product.title: Immune Defense Plus (Topical Patch 30 Day Supply) - 30 Patches | PatchMD
product.description:
Introducing the Immunity Patch

PatchMD is the original patch brand specializing in innovative wellness solutions, with our Immunity Patch being a standout product. This vitamin patch is expertly crafted to support the immune system, featuring a blend of high-quality ingredients known for their important roles in maintaining health.


Key ingredients in this patch include Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) and Vitamin D3, both essential for a normal function of the immune system. Vitamin C is crucial for the production of white blood cells, which fight infections, while Vitamin D3 has a role in the process of cell division.


Additionally, the patch contains Zinc Citrate, which contributes to normal DNA synthesis, and a range of all-natural ingredients like Black Elderberry Extract, Oregano Oil, and Ginkgo Biloba, known for their herbal remedy properties.


Why these patches works so well

Designed for ease of use, the patch is applied to a relatively hair-free part of the human body, such as the inner wrist. This ensures optimal absorption of the daily dose of nutrients over 24 hours. Being gluten-free and devoid of artificial coloring, it’s an excellent choice for those seeking a natural approach to wellness.


PatchMD offers this great product with the convenience of a subscription service. By opting to subscribe and save, customers can have their favorite items, like the Immunity Plus Patch, automatically delivered at a total price that reflects savings. The subscription can be upgraded at any time, ensuring customers always have their wellness patches on hand.


The Immunity Defense Patch is a new patch in the market, earning 5 stars for its effectiveness and quality. With free shipping on the first order, PatchMD makes it easy to incorporate these patches into your daily routine and stay healthy. Topical Immunity Defense is more than just a dietary supplement; it’s a commitment to your well-being, delivered straight to your door.


Product Description


  • Vitamin D & Zinc have a role in the process of cell division
  • Vitamin C & Zinc contribute to the protection of cells from oxidative stress
  • Vitamin C contributes to maintain the normal function of the immune system during and after intense physical exercise
  • Zinc, Vitamin C & D contribute to the normal function of the immune system

Our bodies and specifically our immune systems have never been under more stress or invasion. With increased toxic burden and decreased nutrient density in our food, our immune system is left with less support for optimal function. Immune Defense Plus is the first and only supplement to combine immune support for the liver and antioxidant support all in one topical patch. product.description:
Biotin Plus Topical Patch is a great option if you're looking to boost the health of your hair, skin and nails. As well as benefiting from biotin’s beauty-boosting properties, it may also help to maintain a healthy metabolism and immune system. It is jam-packed with biotin (vitamin B7), alongside complementary vitamins such as folate (vitamin B9), vitamin C and vitamin A.

- Could help to strengthen breakage-prone

- May help to support healthy, glowing skin

- May help to strengthen breakage-prone nails

- Can support a healthy metabolism and optimum energy levels

- May be beneficial for those suffering with digestive issues

- May be beneficial for vegetarians/vegans

Biotin helps build keratin, the protein responsible for good skin, hair and nails. Studies suggest biotin helps to increase the strength of the hair, as well as producing fatty acids that nourish the skin and help your oil glands work properly. It also plays a crucial role in metabolising carbohydrates and protein, giving your cells energy. It may also benefit those who suffer from gut issues or enzyme deficiencies, where biotin may be low, as it is made naturally by our gut bacteria. Also beneficial if you're vegetarian/vegan, as biotin in the diet is largely found naturally in egg yolk and meat.

Magnesium levels are often depleted in foods, as a result of poor soil quality. Yet, it is one of the most important minerals and needed for so many reactions to occur in the body. Without a plentiful supply of magnesium, the electrolyte balance is out of balance and this can lead to things like muscle cramps. Magnesium works alongside calcium and phosphorus to support bone and dental health. It is also needed for the process of making energy and therefore when we have sufficient magnesium, our energy levels are often higher.

Zinc is an important mineral for health. It works alongside vitamin C and D to support the immune system. It is needed by the brain for optimal brain function. product.title: Magnesium Glycinate - 180 Capsules | Pure Encapsulations
product.description:
Magnesium Glycinate by Pure Encapsulations is a well tolerated form of magnesium, therefore suitable for those with sensitive digestive systems. It is in a chelated form, which makes it more absorbable. Magnesium is needed for over 300 enzymatic reactions in the body.

- Supports the maintenance of healthy bones and teeth

- Can support muscle health and may prevent or reduce cramps

- Supports the normal functioning of the nervous system

- May boost energy levels

- May help to reduce tiredness and fatigue

- May support mood and emotional health

Magnesium Glycinate is well tolerated and highly bioavailable and absorbable for those who struggle to take other forms of magnesium. Magnesium levels are often depleted in foods, as a result of poor soil quality. Yet, it is one of the most important minerals and needed for so many reactions to occur in the body. Without a plentiful supply of magnesium, the electrolyte balance is out of balance and this can lead to things like muscle cramps. Magnesium works alongside calcium and phosphorus to support bone and dental health. It is also needed for the process of making energy and therefore when we have sufficient magnesium, our energy levels are often higher.

Suggested use is 1-4 capsules daily.

Hydroxo B12 comes in a form of vitamin B12 that is suitable for those who have problems with methylated forms of vitamins and minerals. In hydroxocobalamin form, it is still able to support healthy methylation, by easily being able to convert in to the active forms of B12. B12 is an important vitamin for healthy detoxification to help to rid the body of toxins. Vitamin B12 deficiency is typically characterised by poor memory, fatigue and tingling in the hands and feet. B12 has been found to support healthy levels of nitric oxide, which when too high, can trigger headaches and migraines. As B12 is found mostly in animal foods, deficiency can be common amongst vegans or vegetarians. product.title: L-5-MTHF - 60 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
L-5-MTHF by Seeking Health is a potent dose of folate in a methylated form. This means that it comes in a form that is readily available to the body because it requires no further steps for it to be broken down. This can be beneficial for those with a gene mutation on the MTHFR gene. Folate is not only important for women planning to conceive, but is a crucial B vitamin for the rest of the population too.

  • May support a healthy nervous system
  • May help to support methylation
  • May help to support cell health
  • Can be used alongside other suitable prenatal supplements as part of a prenatal regimen

Folate is a water soluble B vitamin, therefore needs to be consumed every day to maintain adequate levels, as it cannot be stored in the body. It is typically found in green leafy vegetables, citrus fruits and dried beans and peas. Folate is important for supporting a healthy nervous system. It is also important for heart health as it helps convert homocysteine to methionine. Without this conversion, homocysteine levels become too high, which can be damaging to the heart. Folate is one of the most important nutrients to be taken prior to conception and is recommended to be taken 3 months prior to planning to conceive and throughout the first trimester, to reduce the risk of neural tube defects in the developing foetus.


Suggested use is 1 capsule daily.

Our liposomes are composed of non-hydrogenated phospholipids, derived from GMO-free sunflower oil. This is a soy free product.

- Helps to support the immune system and provides a source of antioxidants

- Helps to support healthy skin and may help to reduce dry skin or acne and speed up wound healing

- Supports eye health and vision and may help to reduce symptoms of dry eyes

- May support dental health and promote normal saliva production

- May be beneficial for both male and female fertility

- May be beneficial for vegetarians or vegans, whose diets are typically low in the active form of vitamin A

Vitamin A Drops is a highly-absorbable supplement with 100% preformed vitamin A as retinyl palmitate in liquid form. Vitamin A can come in two forms: either as beta-carotene, found in fruit and vegetables, or retinyl palmitate, found predominantly in animal products. The retinyl palmitate form is already biologically active, so it is better absorbed by the body, whereas beta-carotene needs to be converted in the body before it can be absorbed. A large proportion of people may have a gene variation that can affect their ability to convert beta-carotene into the active form. As a result, deficiency can occur, particularly in those who do not consume animal products. Symptoms of vitamin A deficiency include dry or flaky skin, acne, dry eyes, infertility, immune issues, poor wound healing, birth defects or foetal heart disease or abnormality.

Vitamin A is important for many different aspects of health. It can help to support normal growth and development and helps to support wound healing and is important for healthy skin. Vitamin A may also help to support inflammation levels as it is a powerful antioxidant. Antioxidants are important for protecting cells from damage by free radicals, which can contribute to ill health and ageing.

Suggested use is one drop by mouth daily.

product.title: Vitamin D3 + K2 - 60 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
Vitamin D3 + K2 by Seeking Health is a supplement that works together to support different aspects of health. It provides a high dose of vitamin D to help to maintain high levels. Taking vitamin D alongside vitamin K is particularly beneficial for calcium absorption and bone health, as the two work together in the body.

- Provides a high 5000 IU (125 mcg) dose of vitamin D, in its preferred for as vitamin D3

- Provides vitamin K in its most bioavailable form as vitamin K2

- Supports bone health by supporting healthy calcium absorption

- May help to support the immune system

- Can support healthy growth and development

- May be beneficial for circulatory health and may help to prevent cardiovascular disease

Vitamin D3 + K2 provides vitamin D and K in their most optimal forms, meaning the body can easily utilise them. Together, the two vitamins help to support bone health. Vitamin D helps to increase the absorption of calcium from foods into the blood, and Vitamin K helps to ensure calcium is deposited in the bones rather than the arteries. This may help to prevent the calcification of the arteries and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Keeping levels of calcium regulated in the blood is also beneficial for the health of the kidneys. Vitamin D is important for the immune system and works alongside vitamin C and zinc to support it. Vitamin D deficiency is common, especially in those who live in countries where the sun is not strong enough in the winter, those with darker skin tones and the elderly.

Suggested use is 1 capsule daily.

product.title: Histamine Digest - 90 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™)- you may receive the old packaging, no change in formulation.

Dao Enzyme contains a patented enzyme formula featuring diamine oxidase (DAO). 

Normally, an enzyme in your gut breaks down histamine from your diet. This enzyme is called Diamine Oxidase or DAO. Some people, due to genetics or other factors, do not produce enough DAO enzymes. As a result, they may experience uncomfortable symptoms when eating high-histamine foods.

product.description:
Your gut health sets the stage for your overall health.

Ensuring healthy digestion and nutrient absorption are some of the most powerful actions you can take to support immune function.†

Gut Nutrients contains traditional herbs, including marshmallow root, licorice extract (DGL), milk thistle, cat’s claw, aloe vera, turmeric, and slippery elm. It also contains targeted nutrients like N-Acetyl-D-Glucosamine and MSM. Each serving of Gut Nutrients provides 500 mg of citrus pectin. This natural fiber provides bulk to support healthy bowel movements. It promotes regular detoxification by binding to toxins. This formula is gluten-free and free of GMO markers.† Gut Nutrients is free from L-glutamine for those who do not tolerate it. The convenient capsules provide a lower strength than our best-selling Gut Nutrients powder.† If you're ready to optimize your digestive and gastrointestinal wellness, talk to your healthcare team about Gut Nutrients.

product.title: Blood Sugar Support - 120 Capsules | Vital Nutrients
product.description:
Blood Sugar Support by Vital Nutrients has been formulated to support optimal pancreatic function with a combination of eight powerful, natural ingredients. Pancreatic function naturally declines with age, but can also be affected by a diet high in carbohydrates and sugar, as well as frequent eating and snacking.

- Supports optimal function of the pancreas

- May promote healthy blood sugar levels

- May help to maintain healthy HDL cholesterol levels

- May help to maintain lean muscle mass

- May help to maintain healthy blood sugar levels post eating

- May help to support energy levels

The pancreas releases insulin to balance blood sugar levels after eating. However, eating too frequently, or eating a high carbohydrate diet makes the pancreas have to work harder, which, over time, can become fatigued and therefore less effective. This can also lead to an imbalance of blood sugar levels and insulin resistance. Blood Sugar Support contains a blend of ingredients designed to support the health of the pancreas and promote healthy blood sugar levels. Cinnamon has been included for its effect on already healthy blood sugar levels in healthy people. Chromium can help to maintain already lean muscle mass and already healthy levels of HDL cholesterol, aka the "good" cholesterol. American ginseng, holy basil and gymnema sylvestre have been included for their effect on minimising blood sugar spikes after eating.

Suggested use is 2 capsules, 2 times daily.

• Can help support male fertility and sperm motility

Acetyl L-Carnitine is an easy to take powder that is designed to support brain health and cognitive function, by increasing levels of acetylcholine, an important neurotransmitter. This supplement can help decrease fatigue in the body and mind, and it may also improve mild memory problems like absentmindedness or forgetfulness associated with age. Acetyl L-Carnitine can also improve male fertility and sperm motility, and it may benefit nerve health, improving vibratory sensation and peripheral nerve function.

• Helps to maintain bone health

• Supports healthy teeth

• Can enhance bone density

• May reduce risk of fractures

• Can be combined with vitamin D

• May prevent bone pain

Strontium is a natural element that plays a vital role in bone health. It works alongside calcium to help increase bone density, while also slowing the rate of bone loss. It may increase the ability to absorb calcium and stimulates bone building cells to work more optimally. By helping to increase bone density, it may increase resistance to fractures. Strontium can be even more beneficial when taken alongside calcium and vitamin D.

Suggested use is 3 capsules daily.

product.title: L-Theanine 200mg - 60 Capsules | Vital Nutrients
product.description:
L-Theanine by Vital Nutrients - delivers 200 mg L-Theanine per serving.


L-theanine is an amino acid naturally found in tea leaves, particularly in green tea. L-theanine has been consumed for centuries, primarily through tea consumption. Traditional tea-drinking cultures, especially in East Asia where green tea is prevalent, have unknowingly incorporated L-theanine into their daily routines. While the historical use of L-theanine is deeply rooted in tea-drinking traditions, its isolated supplementation has become more common in recent years. Researchers and consumers alike have shown growing interest in exploring its potential benefits, leading to an increase in studies and awareness surrounding L-theanine.


Suggested use - 1 capsule, 3 times a day or as directed by a healthcare practitioners.

Adrenotone™ can help the body manage this response.

CoQ10 is a nutrient that supports the function of the mitochondria (the power factories or our cells). CoQ10 is found in greater abundance in the cells of energy-rich tissues like the heart and eyes. As we age our levels of CoQ10 decrease. Taking statins also depletes the body of CoQ10. Ubiquinol, the reduced, active, antioxidant form of Co-Q10 is significantly better absorbed than regular Co-Q10. Jarrow Formulas’ proprietary QH-absorb® formula has been shown clinically in humans to increase Co-Q10 levels by 222%.

Suggested use is 1 capsule up to 3 times a day.

product.title: Biofilm Defense - 60 Capsules | Kirkman Labs
product.description:
Biofilm Defense® is a combination of unique enzymes that have the ability to dissolve the sugars and fibrins in biofilms.

• Helps to dissolve biofilms

• Supports the immune system
• Supports digestion of intestinal biofilm

Biofilms protect unwanted microorganisms from the immune system. Scientists have discovered that the composition of most biofilms consists of sugar molecules or polysaccharides, minerals (such as calcium, iron and magnesium), DNA and fibrin. Biofilm Defense® degrades these components. Because it lacks any significant amount of protease, which can irritate a sensitive GI tract, Biofilm Defense® can be taken on an empty stomach.

product.title: Serretia (Serrapeptase) 250,000 SPU's - 90 Capsules | Arthur Andrew Medical
product.description:
Serrapeptase is a proteolytic (protein-splitting) enzyme with high fibrinolytic activity.

Serretia Serrapeptase is contains 250,000 serratiopeptidase units (SPUs) per dose of 2 capsules. Serratiopeptidase units (SPUs) are a measurement unit used to quantify the activity of the enzyme serratiopeptidase.


Serrapeptase was discovered when scientists studied silkworms and their ability to break down silk cocoons. They found that the silkworm secreted an enzyme responsible for breaking down the silk. While researching the enzyme further, they discovered a specific type of bacteria inside the silkworm that produced the enzyme, now known as Serratia E-15.

Serratia E-15 is used today during the production process of serrapeptase. Good to know: no silkworms are used to produce serrapeptase.

product.title: TMG 500mg - 60 Liquid Capsules | Life Extension
product.description:
Trimethylglycine (TMG), also known as glycine betaine, refers to three methyl groups attached to a molecule of glycine. In the 1950s, TMG was discovered to be beneficial to the heart and it functions in a similar way to vitamin B12.

As a methyl donor, it provides methyl groups to other bodily molecules. When a TMG methyl group is donated to a molecule of homocysteine, the cardiovascular risk factor is converted back to the beneficial amino acid, methionine. While working to promote healthy levels of homocysteine, alone or in conjunction with other nutrients, it has been attested as an important nutrient for cardiovascular health.

product.title: Glycine 1000mg - 100 Capsules | Life Extension
product.description:
Glycine is a non-essential amino acid that is naturally present in the body and involved in a variety of physiological processes.

It is a component of proteins and plays a role in normal metabolism. Glycine is also involved in biochemical processes within the body and is naturally found in protein-rich foods.

Glycine can be consumed as part of a varied and balanced diet. Food supplements may provide a convenient way to increase intake where desired.

For adults, glycine is commonly used in amounts ranging from 1 to 3 grams per day. Glycine supplements are available in different dosages, including 1000 mg capsules for convenient intake.

product.description:
Calcium Magnesium by Pure Encapsulations contains both calcium and magnesium in their most absorbable forms, citrate and malate. Calcium and magnesium work together in the body so taking them together can be beneficial. They are important for normal muscle function and the maintenance of normal bones and teeth.

- Supports bone and teeth health

- Supports the healthy functioning of the nervous system

- Important for the normal functioning of muscles

- Supports energy production and may reduce feelings of tiredness and fatigue

- Needed for electrolyte balance and may help to reduce muscle cramps

Calcium and magnesium work together in the body for many body functions, and are particularly important for bone and dental health, as well as normal functioning muscles. Magnesium in particular can help to reduce muscle cramps. Magnesium helps to regulate calcium levels in the body which is important for bone and teeth health. They work to support the production of energy so can help to reduce tiredness and fatigue.

Suggested use is 3 capsules daily.

product.title: Iron-C - 60 Capsules | Pure Encapsulations
product.description:
Iron-C by Pure Encapsulations contains both iron with the addition of vitamin C, to help the body to absorb the iron better. This is suitable for people with low iron levels, who may, as a result, be suffering from tiredness and fatigue.

- May improve energy levels and reduce tiredness and fatigue
- Iron contributes to the normal formation of blood cells
- Iron is important for the transportation of oxygen around the body
- Suitable for people with low iron levels or high iron needs
- In highly absorbable forms

Taking an iron supplement that also includes vitamin C can help to enhance the absorption of iron. Iron is important for the formation of haemoglobin and red blood cells which are needed for carrying oxygen around the body, especially to places like the lungs. Iron is also important for the formation of some hormones. When iron levels are too low, it can increase tiredness and fatigue.

Suggested use is 1-3 capsules daily.

product.title: Homocysteine Factors - 60 Capsules | Pure Encapsulations
product.description:
Homocysteine Factors by Pure Encapsulations contains the vitamins needed to help support normal homocysteine levels, which is important for heart health. Homocysteine is an amino acid, that needs to be broken down by vitamins B12, B6 and folate to create other chemicals your body needs. When levels of homocysteine are too high, it can affect the health of your heart, increasing the risk of heart attacks and stroke. High levels have also been linked to an increased risk of dementia.

- May help to support heart health and reduce heart disease

- May help to reduce the risk of dementia

- Contains B vitamins in their active forms so they can be better metabolised by the body

- Can help to support methylation and a healthy breakdown of homocysteine

- Suitable for those with genetic variations in methylation pathways such as MTHFR

- May be beneficial for cognitive health

B vitamins, especially folate, are important for helping the body to optimally methylate which is the process that breaks down and gets rid of homocysteine. For example, it converts folic acid to folate which is the active form the body can use. Some people have a genetic mutation that makes it more difficult to break down homocysteine. Homocysteine Factors provides all the nutrients needed for homocysteine metabolism, in their most active forms.

Suggested use is 1 capsule per day.

It also includes betaine hydrochloride (HCl) to support healthy stomach acid levels and help with the breakdown and absorption of food.

- Designed to help the body break down carbohydrates, proteins, fat and fibre

- Contains lactase which helps the body digest lactose from dairy products

- May improve the digestion of plant fibres, legumes and high FODMAP foods

- May help to improve absorption of nutrients from food

- May help to prevent digestive discomfort after eating

- The inclusion of betaine HCl can help to increase stomach acid, which is important for digestion

Digestive Enzymes Ultra with Betaine HCl can be beneficial for those who struggle to break down and process foods. When food cannot be digested properly, it cannot be absorbed very well either. This supplement may help to break down the most common food groups that people struggle to digest such as lactose, legumes, fats, fibre and protein. It also contains alpha-galactosidase which can help break down high FODMAP foods such as certain fruits and vegetables, legumes and grains. The addition of Betaine HCl helps to increase stomach acid, which can be low for a variety of reasons, and is needed to help with the digestion of food, and the absorption of nutrients, whilst also protecting the body from harmful bacteria ingested from food.

Suggested use is 2 capsules with each meal.

Folate is found in green leafy vegetables but often, we do not consume sufficient amounts, especially when requirements are higher. Those who have problems metabolising homocysteine can benefit from taking a folate supplement, as it helps the body to do this. High levels of homocysteine can lead to an increased risk of heart problems. Folate may be beneficial for those who are struggling with energy levels. It is also an important vitamin to take for women planning to conceive and in the first trimester of pregnancy, as it has been found to significantly reduce the risk of neural tube defects such as spina bifida in unborn babies.

Nattovéna nattokinase differs from other supplements in that the production method used produces a standardised and optimised extract of nattokinase.


Nattokinase supplements are measured in fibrin units (FU), also known as fibrinolytic units. This number indicates the activity of the enzyme. One capsule of Nattovena contains 4,000 FU.

Proteases are enzymes that aid in the cleavage of proteins. Nattokinase has as a component the enzyme 'serine protease, which means it also breaks down proteins. Lipase is an enzyme involved in breaking down fats. 


Rutin is a flavonoid, a type of polyphenol, that occurs naturally in certain plants. It is also known as vitamin P. Rutin occurs naturally in foods such as citrus fruits, apples, tea, buckwheat and asparagus.

Do you often experience digestive discomfort? One of the reasons could be that your body produces fewer digestive enzymes as you age. Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes can provide a powerful dose of amylase, protease, and lipase — these are pancreatic digestive enzymes that work in a variety of pH conditions to support the digestion of carbohydrates, protein, and fat. Enhanced Super Digestive Enzymes can fight back against age-related digestive discomfort using this innovative formulation.

The formula is designed to help improve digestion of proteins, fats, carbohydrates, lactose from dairy products, and hard-to-digest cellulose from vegetables. Acacia fibre, also known as Gum Arabic, is a form of soluble dietary fibre produced using the natural exudate from the Acacia tree. It can also benefit those looking to manage their blood glucose levels and cholesterol levels. It is well tolerated and does not cause digestive discomfort or bloating.

product.title: Plant Digestive Enzymes - 60 Capsules | New Roots Herbal
product.description:
New Roots Herbal’s Plant Digestive Enzymes helps resupply your body with natural plant-digestive enzyme, lost from cooked and processed food. These enzymes digest fats, proteins, carbohydrates, sugars, minerals, grains, and fibres.

When it is in its natural state, raw and unprocessed, the food you eat contains—along with its many nutrients—the enzymes you need to break down that food. But many of us exist on a diet of primarily cooked food, and digestive enzymes are extremely sensitive to heat. In fact, they are more sensitive to heat than vitamins, and are destroyed by any heat above 48 °C (118 °F); imagine what cooking does to digestive enzymes and to your digestion! Not only cooking, but also pasteurization, canning, and microwaving destroy digestive enzymes.

Our plant enzymes possess four major benefits over enzymes derived from the pancreas of animals.

Firstly—and obviously—, they are suitable for vegetarians.

Secondly, they are active over a broader range of foods than animal-derived enzymes.

Thirdly, they begin their work earlier in the digestive process than animal enzymes. Plant enzymes begin working in the stomach; animal enzymes begin working only later, in the intestines. So plant enzymes spare the body a lot of work by predigesting food before it is exposed to your body’s own pancreatic enzymes.

Finally, plant enzymes avoid the possible risk inherent in animal-derived enzymes that your body will recognize them as its own pancreatic enzymes and diminish its own production.

After attaching to the receptors, the serotonin initiates a signaling process that relies on inositol to carry out its function. Serotonin Nutrients includes this important ingredient to make sure the support for serotonin begins at the beginning and ends at the end.


When we are lacking adequate serotonin and have a poor mood, we will often find that we crave foods and behaviors to bring us a boost. This may lead to an increase in consumption of sweets and other additive foods and behaviors.

product.title: Thiamax High Absorption Vitamin B1 - 60 Capsules | Objective Nutrients
product.description:
Thiamax contains a highly-bioavailable derivative of thiamine (vitamin B1) called TTFD - thiamine tetrahydrofurfuryl disulfide. This form has been widely researched in Japan for its therapeutic potential in addressing thiamine insufficiency.

Unlike other forms of thiamine supplementation, TTFD’s molecular structure allows it to pass through intestinal and cellular membranes without the requirement for a transport system. Once inside the cell, it can be activated and used as a cofactor in important biochemical processes.

TTFD also has a demonstrated capacity to penetrate the blood brain barrier and increase thiamine levels in the brain and central nervous system, where it may be used to support optimal cognition and maintain autonomic nervous system function.

Due to its superior bioavailability, TTFD can be taken in much lower doses than what is considered the “therapeutic dose” of other forms such as thiamine salts.

Thiamax also contains a small amount of magnesium (as magnesium taurate), which is a mineral that is important for supporting how cells can utilize thiamine.

  • Thiamine contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism
  • Thiamine contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system
  • Thiamine contributes to normal psychological function
  • Thiamine contributes to the normal function of the heart
  • Magnesium contributes to normal psychological function
  • Magnesium contributes to normal protein synthesis
  • Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of normal bones & teeth
  • Magnesium contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism
  • Magnesium contributes to electrolyte balance
  • Magnesium contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system

*Disclaimer: Our supplements are trusted and selected by practitioners. Legislation limits the information we can share. For complete details, please refer to a medical library.

product.title: ThiAssist Mineral Formula - 141.6g | Objective Nutrients
product.description:
ThiAssist is designed to support the actions of thiamine at the cellular level and contains five minerals in their bioavailable form. This formula is intended to compliment supplementation with Thiamax or any other form of thiamine taken in higher dosages. This formula does not contain a full spectrum of minerals and should not be used to replace zinc, copper, iron, or any other trace mineral not included in this product.

Magnesium is a cofactor mineral necessary for the activity of thiamine-dependent enzymes (transketolase, pyruvate dehydrogenase, and alpha ketoglutarate dehydrogenase). Two varieties of magnesium with enhanced bioavailability are contained within ThiAssist. Magnesium malate is composed of malic acid, an organic acid involved in the production of cellular energy. Alternatively, magnesium taurate provides the amino acid taurine, which serves numerous roles including supporting antioxidant activity, electrolyte balance, and neurological function.

Potassium is another electrolyte mineral which may become low in thiamine deficiency states. In the form of potassium citrate, this mineral serves the dual function of urinary alkalinization.

Molybdenum is a dietary mineral incorporated into the molybdate cofactor, which acts as a cofactor for oxidase enzymes including xanthine oxidase and sulphite oxidase. Sulphite oxidase plays an important processing of sulphur compounds, reducing the accumulation of the sulphite toxin and converting this into inorganic sulphate. Molybdenum may therefore be useful for improving sulphur metabolism. The molybdenum incorporated into this formula is bound with the amino acid glycine for improved absorption.

Selenomethionine provides the selenium mineral bound with the amino acid methionine, which is the main form found in foods. Selenium is necessary for the action of glutathione peroxidase, a critical enzyme utilized by the endogenous antioxidant system. Selenium is therefore useful in maintaining protection against oxidative stress and may also support health thyroid function.

Finally, ThiAssist also contains the manganese mineral in the form of manganese gluconate. Manganese is necessary for the activity of manganese-superoxide dismutase, a mitochondrial antioxidant. It also serves as a cofactor for a variety of other enzymes including Pyruvate carboxylase, phosphoenolpyruvate carboxykinase, arginase, glutamine synthetase, prolidase, and glycosyltransferases. Earlier research highlighted a potential relationship between manganese and thiamine status, although this connection has not been well elucidated.

product.title: Thiamega High Dose Thiamine Complex - 60 Capsules | Objective Nutrients
product.description:
Thiamega provides a high dosage of vitamin B1 in four different forms, each possessing unique properties.

Three of these forms are synthetic derivatives originally developed in Japan and are known to possess much greater bio-availability compared with ordinary thiamine salts.

Benfotiamine is an S-acyl derivative of thiamine known for its ability to improve blood sugar management and support peripheral nerve function.

Sulbutiamine contains two molecules of thiamine bound together by a disulphide bond. Thiamine Tetrahydrofurfuryl Disulphide (TTFD) contains one thiamine molecule bound with a sulphur-mercaptan group, which provides it with unique properties.

The molecular structure of these three thiamine derivatives allows them to pass through intestinal and cellular membranes without the requirement for a transport system. Once inside the cell, they deliver thiamine which can be activated and used as a cofactor in important biochemical processes.

Benfotiamine, sulbutiamine and TTFD may increase brain levels of thiamine, support cognition and central nervous system function.

Each capsule delivers a total of 400mg of thiamine.

product.title: ThiActive B Methylated B-Complex - 60 Capsules | Objective Nutrients
product.description:
ThiActive B-Complex provides a full spectrum of nutritional B vitamins to complement the action of thiamine (vitamin B1) within the cell, including two different forms of thiamine with high bioavailability.

Benfotiamine is an S-acyl derivative of thiamine known for its ability to improve blood sugar management and support peripheral nerve function. Thiamine Tetrahydrofurfuryl Disulphide (TTFD) contains one thiamine molecule bound with a sulphur-mercaptan group, which provides it with unique properties.

The molecular structure of these two thiamine derivatives allows them to pass through intestinal and cellular membranes without the requirement for a transport system. Once inside the cell, they deliver thiamine which can be activated and used as a cofactor in important biochemical processes.

To support the process of methylation, this complex includes active folate in the form of L-methyl folate, along with non-methylated folate in the form of folinic acid (calcium folinate). Similarly, two types of active vitamin B12 are provided in the forms of methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin.

This formula also contains the activated form of vitamin B2 (riboflavin-5-phosphate) and vitamin B6 (pyrixodal-5-phosphate).

As an additional ingredient, D-ribose is included as a sugar precursor to promote cellular ATP production.

This product was designed for people who feel that they benefit from methylated vitamins in their active form.

product.title: 24k Gold Plated Ear Seed Kit | Acu Seeds
product.description:
If you're looking for a natural, effective, and side-effect-free way to support a broad spectrum of health concerns, look no further than ear seeds! Rooted in the principles of Chinese medicine, ear seeds are an ancient tool that may support a broad spectrum of health concerns.

They are a needle-free form of acupuncture that has been used in Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) for thousands of years. TCM teaches that the ear is a microsystem of the whole body, where certain points on the ear correspond to different organs or body parts. Energy pathways (or ‘qi’ or vital life energy) pass through the ear and ear seeds stimulate specific points which send an abundant flow of energy to the related organ or area that needs attention. Think of it like reflexology, but for the ears instead of the feet.

This Ear Seed Kit makes it easy to get started with ear seeds from the comfort of your own home.

Omega-3 fats can be obtained by eating fatty fish or taking fish oil supplements. Types of fish like mackerel, sardines, anchovies, and krill oil are good sources of omega-3 fatty acids. Without a diet high in fish consumption, getting the proper intake of omega-3 required can be difficult. That’s why many prefer omega-3 fatty acid supplements.

Optimal Fish Oil is IFOS certified for impeccable standards in purity, cleanliness and stability.

Optimal Fish Oil includes eicosapentaenoic acid (EPA) and docosahexaenoic acid (DHA). These important omega-3 fatty acids have many health benefits:


  • DHA and EPA contribute to the maintenance of normal blood triglyceride levels
  • EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart
  • DHA and EPA contribute to the maintenance of normal blood pressure

Try Optimal Fish Oil today to better support your body’s needs.

Skin boosting collagen patches, packed with a powerful combination of collagen, hyaluronic acid and vitamins, expertly selected to support healthy skin, hair, nails and joints. A great choice for anyone wanting to try a non-invasive, natural method to benefit skin tone and alleviate wrinkles and dry skin. Can also be used post workout, to promote joint and muscle repair and strength.

Collagen is the main protein found in the connective tissue of our skin, tendons, ligaments and muscles. Research shows collagen production in the body begins to decline as we age, resulting in fine lines, wrinkles and worn out joints and muscles.

Our collagen patch works by stimulating your body’s collagen production. It may also promote the creation of other proteins that help the structure of your skin, muscles and joints, such as elastin and fibrillin.

Using a topical collagen patch could also help to increase skin hydration, a must if you’ve ever smoked, or spent significant time in the sun.

product.title: Complete Collagen Unflavored - 450g | NoordCode
product.description:
NoordCode Complete Collagen with  a slightly sweet-sour flavour from the acerola and glycine contains 5 types of collagen from 3 sources of collagen hydrolysate. 

Type I collagen is the most abundant collagen in the body, found mainly in skin, hair, nails, bones and ligaments.
Type II collagen is mainly found in cartilage between joints.
Type III collagen is common along with type I in skin and blood vessels.
Type V collagen is found in the skin and placenta and co-occurs with type I.
Type X collagen is part of the bone and cartilage structure.

Collagen from the skin of grass-fed cattle

The basis of NoordCode Complete Collagen is grass-fed bovine collagen hydrolysate. This collagen hydrolysate is also available separately as NoordCode Pure Collagen. The collagen is derived from the skin, bones, tendons and joints of grass-fed, European cattle.

Naticol® Collagen and type II collagen from fish

Fish has a different amino acid profile to bovine collagen, making it a good addition to your collagen intake. Naticol® is a pure collagen hydrolysate made from fish skins left over after filleting. The fish skins come from sustainable, wild-caught fish and farmed fish, in order to use as many different sources as possible. Naticol thus takes a 'waste product' and turns it into a high-quality collagen hydrolysate. It is readily soluble in liquids.

Ovomet® collagen from eggshell membranes

The eggshell membrane is the thin membrane directly under the eggshell. This membrane contains not only collagen, but also elastin, hyaluronic acid, glucosamine and chondroitin. These substances are also common in our skin. Eggshell membrane is therefore a nice way to get these substances.
Ovomet® hydrolysed eggshell membrane is readily bioavailable, just like the bovine and fish collagen in NoordCode Complete Collagen.

Enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate

NoordCode uses enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate. This requires no heating or chemicals that could damage the protein.

125 g Vitamin C from Acerola berries

The body uses vitamin C in the production of collagen. NoordCode Complete Collagen therefore contains 125 mg of vitamin C from acerola berries per serving (15 g). Acerola berries are a natural source of vitamin C.
Vitamin C supports normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin, blood vessels, bones & cartilage, teeth & gums.


  • Vitamin C contributes to maintain the normal function of the immune system during and after intense physical exercise
  • Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of blood vessels, bones, cartilage, skin, teeth & gums

Its production and processing is completely focused on maintaining its outstanding flavour. This unique product is therefore hugely popular among cocoa lovers.

Bean to bar production
NoordCode uses cocoa powder made according to the bean to bar concept. Bean to bar means that the chocolate producer controls all processing steps from the cocoa (bean) to the chocolate bar. The producer has a direct relationship with cocoa farmers and pays a fair price for cocoa. This allows farmers to focus on producing superior cocoa sustainably.
The cocoa powder in Power Cacao comes from Peru. NoordCode opts for maximum polyphenol retention and minimising the risk of mould growth when processing.

Concentrated mushroom extracts from KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms
KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms is a Finnish producer of potent mushroom extracts. They use the fruiting bodies of organically grown or wild-picked mushrooms, where most of the useful substances can be found. Ultrasonic Assisted Extraction (UAE) gently breaks open the mushroom cells to extract as many useful substances from the mushrooms as possible. The extract of water and alcohol is then sprayed into powder containing the useful mushroom substances. KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms' powder extracts are a perfect addition to NoordCode Power Cocoa in terms of function and flavour.

225 mg Lion's Mane extract
Lion's Mane (Hericium erinaceus) gets its name from the floppy spines reminiscent of a lion's mane. Lion's Mane is found in Europe, North America and Asia and is traditionally used in China.
KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms grows Lion's Mane itself on birch logs organically.
Each serving of Power Cacao contains 225 mg of Lion's Mane extract.

135 mg Chaga extract
Chaga (Inonotus obliquus) is found in the northern regions of Europe and Asia and has been traditionally used there for centuries. The fungus grows mainly in birch trees and has a characteristic cracked, blackened appearance with a red-orange core.
KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms makes their extract with wild-harvested chaga from Lapland, in northern Finland. Due to the cold winters and unpolluted nature, you can find the best quality and most effective chaga in Lapland.
Each serving of Power Cacao contains 135 mg of Chaga extract.

product.title: Organic Pure Whey - Single Servings 360g | NoordCode
product.description:
NoordCode Pure Whey is organically produced, pure whey protein concentrate. The milk comes from grass-fed cows grazing in the Alps. 80% protein. For muscle maintenance, growth and recovery.

Grass-fed, free-grazing cows from the Alps
The milk for NoordCode Pure Whey comes from cows that graze in the Alps. The cows eat only grass or grass products from pastures that have never been exposed to pesticides. They are raised according to organic guidelines and receive no hormones or antibiotics. As a result, the milk is of the highest quality.

Only whey protein, with no additives or flavours
Pure Whey contains only whey protein concentrate, as the name says. It contains no flavours or other additives. This makes it a versatile product that you can use in whatever way you like.

Soft processing without irradiation
NoordCode Pure Whey is prepared using gentle heating without irradiation. This keeps as much protein as possible intact while making the whey protein concentrate food-safe.

product.title: Electrolytes Strawberry Cherry - 250g | NoordCode
product.description:
The importance of electrolytes

Electrolytes are charged particles (often minerals) that perform important bodily functions. Well-known electrolytes are sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium and chloride. You get these substances from food and lose them through sweat and urine. In addition, you can take them with a supplement.

When to take extra electrolytes
In these situations, you might consider taking more electrolytes:

  • After getting up to start the day properly hydrated.
  • Salt helps with water absorption. Water, together with a little salt, hydrates more than water alone.
  • When you sweat a lot, such as during sports or hot weather.
  • Through sweat, you lose both water and electrolytes. Add both to maintain your water balance.
  • When you follow a low-carbohydrate/ketogenic diet.
  • When you eat carbohydrates daily, your body retains more salt. Therefore, when your carbohydrate intake is low, you lose electrolytes faster.
  • When you eat a lot of fresh produce that is low in salt.
  • Processed foods often contain added salt. If you cook with fresh products, you often don't add as much salt.

In these situations, you must pay more attention to your electrolyte intake. An electrolyte supplement makes it easy and tasty to do so.  



Benefits of NoordCode Electrolytes
The minerals in NoordCode Electrolytes Strawberry Cherry provide the following benefits.

Energy

Magnesium supports your energy levels.
Magnesium helps to reduce fatigue and fatigue.

Muscle and nerve function

Potassium and Magnesium are important for normal muscle function.
Potassium and Magnesium support the normal function of nerve cells.
Magnesium plays a role in pulse transmission between (nerve) cells.
Magnesium contributes to normal mental capacity.

Blood pressure and water balance.

Potassium maintains normal blood pressure.
Magnesium provides support in maintaining normal water and mineral balance.

Further benefits

Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of strong bones and teeth.
Magnesium plays a role in tissue growth and development.
Magnesium helps in building body protein.

Optimal electrolytes ratios
The composition of NoordCode Electrolytes is:

1000 mg sodium
400 mg potassium (20% RI)
76 mg magnesium (20% RI)

NoordCode has based this optimal electrolytes ratio on the following factors.


Sodium:potassium ratio
The body uses sodium and potassium together to maintain the amount of water inside and outside cells.

There is no absolute "perfect" ratio of sodium to potassium that applies to everyone, but health organizations recommend general guidelines.

According to most guidelines, the ideal ratio of sodium to potassium is somewhere between 1:1 and 1:2. For every gram of sodium, you should get about 1-2 grams of potassium.

NoordCode opts for a ratio of sodium:potassium of 5:2. This assumes you also get potassium through food, such as fruit, potatoes, meat, avocado and leafy vegetables. So your total sodium:potassium intake will still end up around a 1:2 ratio.


The amount of magnesium
You get most magnesium from magnesium-rich foods such as leafy greens, nuts and seeds. 76 mg of magnesium makes a nice contribution to your daily intake.


High-quality ingredients
The mix contains unrefined sea salt, a natural source of sodium that has not been chemically processed. In addition to sodium, this salt contains many other trace minerals that give it its characteristic colour and rich flavour. A potential disadvantage of sea salt is contamination. We, therefore, use only very pure salt that is tested free of heavy metals and microplastics.

Nutrition experts recommend potassium citrate, which we have used for this formula.

The 76 mg of magnesium comes from Aquamin™ Mg, magnesium hydroxide, derived from seawater.


Sodium and Chloride from Salt
When we talk about salt, we often refer to sodium chloride. Sodium chloride is the main component of all salts. Salt provides sodium and chloride, which are both electrolytes. By weight, salt consists of 40% sodium and 60% chloride.

NoordCode Electrolytes contains 1.1 g of sodium and approximately 1.6 g of chloride from sea salt per serving.


Sugar-free mix suitable for fasting and keto
NoordCode Electrolytes Strawberry Cherry contains no added sugar and few carbohydrates, making it a perfect fit for a ketogenic or low-carbohydrate diet. The calories per serving are so low that they do not interfere with your (water) fasting. So you can always enjoy this tasty electrolyte mix that delivers the promised electrolytes without unnecessary additives.


European alternative to LMNT Recharge
The most well-known and popular electrolyte mix is LMNT Recharge. Thought leaders widely praise this US electrolyte mix as a functional, low-sugar, and tasty electrolyte drink. Unfortunately, LMNT no longer supplies Europe and other US brands, which are expensive due to import costs.

NoordCode Electrolytes are now your European alternative.


The flavour
The delicious Strawberry Cherry flavour comes from the natural aroma and is sweetened with stevia.

product.title: Everyday Essentials - 60 Capsules | NoordCode
product.description:
Everyday Essentials provides 45 researched vitamins, minerals, herbs, amino acids, and other useful substances in the right amounts. Active and available forms for methylation support.

NoordCode Everyday Essentials belongs to the top quality multivitamins. Here's why:

Active and well absorbable forms
You want to supplement your vitamins and minerals because of their functions in your body. Your body must first absorb the nutrient and then put them to work. The form of the nutrient is decisive in this respect. It is better to take enough of the active forms than to take too much of substances that do almost nothing for you.
Everyday Essentials contains the most active and bioavailable forms of vitamins and minerals. These nutrients are best absorbed and do their job immediately. Personal variation can make some vitamin forms not equally effective for everyone. In such cases, we choose the active form that works for everyone. Folate (B11) is found as methyltetrahydrofolate and B12 as methylcobalamin.


Meaningful doses of vitamins, minerals and other ingredients
The doses of nutrients have been chosen on the basis of modern dietary patterns and scientific research. This way, you supplement the vitamins and minerals that we eat less of nowadays. For certain nutrients, a higher dose is also extra beneficial according to research. The effective dosage of the other ingredients has been chosen on the basis of scientific research.

Enhanced with herbs, amino acids and other useful extras
Everyday Essentials contains a large number of ingredients that, according to scientific research, are of interest to our health. Vitamins and minerals are not the only substances that benefit the body. Herbs, amino acids, polyphenols and other substances also make their contribution. Think of resveratrol, curcuma, PQQ and CoQ10, among others.

The formulas of NoordCode are compatible with each other: you can use all NoordCode supplements together.

product.title: Mag Six - 60 Capsules | NoordCode
product.description:
NoordCode Mag Six contains 6 types of magnesium with vitamin B6. High bioavailability of magnesium, supported by vitamin B6. For energy, muscles and mental performance.
6 bioavailable forms of magnesium. 100 mg magnesium per capsule (26% RI)

Magnesium forms in supplements can differ greatly from one another. Non-organic forms of magnesium are less water-soluble and therefore less bioavailable. The widely used and inexpensive magnesium oxide, for example, is also used as a laxative or filler, not just as a magnesium supplement. Organic compounds (with amino acids) are absorbed best because of their good water solubility. These are therefore the better forms of magnesium in supplements.

NoordCode Mag Six contains six forms of magnesium, each with its own benefits. All forms were selected for their good bioavailability and interesting properties.

Magnesium citrate: highly absorbable form widely used in supplements.
Magnesium malate: effective for energy support.
Magnesium taurate: provides additional benefits of the amino acid taurate.
Magnesium bisglycinate: absorbed differently from other forms of magnesium.
Magnesium glycerophosphate: highly absorbable magnesium.
Magnesium hydroxide: natural magnesium compound from seawater with trace minerals.

Synergy of magnesium and vitamin B6
Magnesium and vitamin B6 work together in many ways. They both support among others energy levels, nerve cells and muscles. Vitamin B6 also supports the absorption of magnesium from food, so it makes sense to combine them in supplements.

Benefits of magnesium and vitamin B6

Energy
Magnesium and vitamin B6 support your energy levels.
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to extra energy when tired and fatigued.
Vitamin B6 contributes to a good energy supply in the muscles.

Nervous system and mental performance
Magnesium and vitamin B6 support the normal functioning of the nervous system.
Magnesium plays a role in the transmission of impulses between (nerve) cells.
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to normal mental performance, such as memory, concentration and learning ability.

Muscles, bones and teeth
Magnesium is important for normal muscle function.
Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of strong bones & teeth.
Magnesium contributes to a good electrolyte balance.

Growth
Magnesium plays a role in (the process of) tissue growth and development.
Magnesium plays a role in building body protein.
Vitamin B6 contributes to a normal protein and glycogen metabolism.

Immune system and blood cells
Vitamin B6 contributes to normal functioning of the immune system.
Vitamin B6 contributes to the production of immune cells.
Vitamin B6 contributes to the formation of red blood cells.

product.title: Ultimate Omega Formula -60 Softgels | NoordCode
product.description:
NoordCode Ultimate Omega Formula contains pure, unprocessed Calanus oil with a broad spectrum of marine fats, including omega-3 EPA & DHA and natural astaxanthin. Unique, highly stable, long-lasting new generation of omega-3 oil and much more. For brain, heart & vessels and eyes.

For whom is Ultimate Omega Formula interesting


NoordCode Ultimate Omega Formula is an excellent choice if you can relate to this:


  • Broad nutritional profile: For those who want to get all the good fats from the sea, including omega-3.
  • Bioavailable and effective: Ideal for those looking for an easily absorbable and effective omega-3 supplement.
  • Pure and unoxidised: For those who want to be sure of a pure, stable and undamaged omega-3 supplement.
  • Sustainable and renewable: For those who care about sustainability and protecting fish populations.
  • Straight from nature: For those who want sea fats straight from the source, without tinkering or additives.
  • With astaxanthin: Perfect for those who want to take natural astaxanthin with their omega-3.
  • Nothing removed, nothing added

Ultimate Omega Formula contains nothing but pure Calanus oil. Nothing has been added to the oil and nothing has been removed. The oil is packaged in fish gelatine softgels for easy ingestion.

product.title: Crypto Co-Max - 100 ml | Quicksilver Scientific
product.description:
Magnesium Hydroxide capsules are designed to support GI regularity in those prone to occasional constipation. Two capsules provide 700 mg of magnesium hydroxide to aid healthy bowel motility. 

Magnesium hydroxide is a form of magnesium that has long been used to support the regularity of bowel movements. Unlike other stimulants, magnesium hydroxide helps bowel movement regularity by drawing water into the intestines to help increase hydration and volume of stool.

GI regularity is essential for a healthy gut. Constipation may disrupt the balance of microbes in the gut, promoting an unhealthy gut microbiome. An unhealthy gut microbiome can drive unwanted immune activity and associated health challenges.

product.description:

You will love that it does not contain artificial sweeteners, sugar, essential oils or extracts, or “natural flavours” and is more allergy friendly.

As with all RiseWell products, Flavourless Mineral Toothpaste is 100% clean, safe and naturally effective at strengthening, remineralizing and protecting the teeth.

Use code RISEWELL10 at checkout for 10% off when you add two or more RiseWell products to your cart!

product.title: Canine Basic Nutrients - 90 Chewables | Thorne Vet
product.description:
Nutritional Support for Dogs of All Ages
Canine Basic Nutrients is a multi-vitamin/mineral supplement for all phases of a dog's life. It offers a complete formula of essential and highly absorbable vitamins and minerals. Because of abundant environmental pollution and the shortcomings of modern processed food, it is difficult to know whether a dog is getting all the basic nutrients it needs for optimal health. By supplying a dog with a multi-vitamin/mineral formula early in its life, and certainly before a dog becomes old or ill, you can enhance the quality and length of the dog's life and optimize its vitality.

ThorneVET's Canine Basic Nutrients is intended for use in all phases of a dog's life. It provides a broad range of nutrients, to meet canine needs. The calcium, magnesium, potassium, zinc, copper, and iron in Canine Basic Nutrients are provided in highly absorbable forms. And vitamins B2, B6, B12, and folate are provided in their active, tissue-ready forms.

• For use in dogs only. Canine Basic Nutrients contain vitamins and minerals for dogs of all ages.

product.title: Canine Geriatric Basics - 90 Chewables | Thorne Vet
product.description:
Promotes a good quality of life in older dogs

Canine Geriatric Basics is a multi-nutrient and botanical product to address the needs of the aging dog. It provides significant antioxidant, cardiovascular, GI, cognitive, vision, and joint support. 

An older dog has increased nutritional requirements for specific nutrients that usually may not be provided even by a balanced diet. Canine Geriatric Basics is formulated with several amino acids that support the health of an older dog. This ThorneVET formula also contains flavonoids, CoQ10, and other potent antioxidants. To support brain health, Canine Geriatric Basics enhances neurotransmitter production and positively affects neuronal membranes.

product.title: Paleo Protein - Salted Caramel - 831g | Amy Myers MD
product.description:
A protein powder with a sweet and savory taste

Salted Caramel Protein Powder - A New Experience
My Salted Caramel Paleo Protein is an indulgent mix of sweet and savory. My sweet tooth was always getting me in trouble growing up which is why I created my Salted Caramel Paleo Protein as a healthy alternative. It’s just the right blend of rich caramel and savory sea salt to satisfy your cravings. Even the robust, sweet aroma is enough to send my daughter Elle running into the room every time I open the bag to make a smoothie.   A protein powder with a sweet and savory taste

The Myers Way® Salted Caramel Paleo Protein is one of the only clean, AIP protein powders on the market. It’s gluten, dairy, and sugar-free, and sourced from non-GMO, hormone- and antibiotic-free, grass-fed beef. You also won’t find other ingredients on your ‘avoid’ list including grains, corn, or legumes in my Paleo Protein. It’s truly perfect for everyone, especially those following an AIP/autoimmune protocol, Keto or Paleo diet, or simply avoiding inflammatory foods!

Every serving contains a whopping 21 grams of pure protein. Fantastic for those concerned about getting protein in their diet. Not everyone always has a source of clean, collagen-based protein on hand, so Salted Caramel Paleo Protein comes to the rescue as the perfect way to incorporate an essential supplementation of daily protein.

My Salted Caramel Paleo Protein is quick and easy to prepare. What’s better than clean, pure protein? One that you can mix in a heartbeat and be on your way—that’s why I made sure that my formula mixes so easily—even in water! NO BLENDER NEEDED. It’s great as a quick morning shake or added into a delicious smoothie. Fast, easy, convenient, and fabulous for you. Kids absolutely love it too! It’s perfect for those finicky eaters out there.

product.title: Complete Collagen Orange - 470g | NoordCode
product.description:
The 5 types of collagen in Complete Collagen Orange

Collagen is a protein found in many different parts of the body. Collagen in skin differs from that in cartilage, blood vessels, or bones. Each collagen type's amino acid composition, structure, and function differ.


At least 26 types of collagen have been defined. The most common are:


Type I collagen is the most abundant collagen in the body, found mainly in skin, hair, nails, bones and ligaments.


Type II collagen is mainly found in cartilage between joints.


Type III collagen is common, along with type I in the skin and blood vessels.


Type IV collagen is crucial for forming basal membranes, a specific type of thin layer that separates cells from underlying structures.


Type V collagen is found in the skin and placenta and co-occurs with type I.


Type X collagen is part of the bone and cartilage structure.


Each type of collagen contains slightly different amino acids. With a combination supplement, you take the profile of amino acids that your body also uses to make collagen. So, it's a good strategy to eat different types of collagen if you want to support your own collagen production.


Complete Collagen Orange is a combination supplement containing collagen types I, II, III, V and X from 3 clean sources of collagen hydrolysate: bovine, fish, and eggshell membranes. We added vitamin C from acerola to support collagen production. We have also added 5 grams of extra glycine to the formula, giving you a total of 7 grams per serving. Complete Collagen Orange contains only active ingredients, so no unnecessary additives, such as emulsifiers or flavour enhancers. We have tested the product for heavy metals at a third-party laboratory.

Complete Collagen Oranges 3 collagen sources

Collagen varies not only in types but also between animal species. Fish, eggs, and bovine are excellent sources of collagen. Because of their sustainable origin, we have used them for Complete Collagen Orange to get the most complete collagen profile possible. 

Only enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate

Collagen is the longest protein found in the body. Long protein chains are difficult to digest. Hydrolysation improves digestibility by breaking down collagen into small pieces (peptides). This also makes collagen hydrolysate readily soluble in hot and cold liquids.


At NoordCode, we only use enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate. This requires no heating or chemicals that could damage the protein.



Note: collagen is not a good protein supplement. It is low in BCAAs and tryptophan (essential amino acids). Take collagen for the benefits of glycine.



Collagen from the skin of grass-fed cattle

The basis of NoordCode Complete Collagen Orange is grass-fed bovine collagen hydrolysate. This collagen hydrolysate is also available separately as NoordCode Pure Collagen. The collagen is derived from grass-fed European cattle's skin, bones, tendons and joints.



Naticol® Collagen and type II collagen from sustainable fish

Fish has a different amino acid profile to bovine collagen, making it a good addition to your collagen intake. Naticol® is a pure collagen hydrolysate made from leftover fish skins after filleting. The fish skins come from sustainable, wild-caught and farmed fish, to use as many different sources as possible. Naticol® thus takes a 'waste product' and turns it into a high-quality collagen supplement.


Naticol® has a Friends of the Sea certificate, certification for fish, seafood from sustainable fisheries, and aquaculture.



Ovomet® collagen from eggshell membranes

The eggshell membrane is the thin membrane directly under the eggshell. This membrane contains not only collagen but also elastin, hyaluronic acid, glucosamine, and chondroitin. These substances are also common in our skin. The eggshell membrane is, therefore, an excellent way to obtain these substances. Ovomet® hydrolysed eggshell membrane is readily bioavailable, just like the bovine and fish collagen in Complete Collagen.



125 g Vitamin C from Acerola berries

The body uses vitamin C in the production of collagen. NoordCode Complete Collagen, therefore, contains 125 mg of vitamin C from acerola berries per serving (15 g). Acerola berries are a natural source of vitamin C.


Vitamin C supports normal collagen formation, which is necessary for the normal function of skin, blood vessels, bones and cartilage, teeth, and gums.


Furthermore, vitamin C provides the following benefits:


  • Supports the normal function of the immune system.
  • Protects the cells against oxidative stress.
  • Supports normal psychological function and normal functioning of the nervous system.
  • Helps to reduce fatigue.
  • Promotes absorption of iron from the diet.
  • Helps regenerate the reduced form of vitamin E.


7 grams of glycine per serving

The amino acid glycine is one of the main components of collagen. Many people, therefore, take a collagen supplement as a natural source of glycine. NoordCode further enhances Complete Collagen with L-glycine. Each 15-gram serving provides 7 grams of glycine, of which 5 grams have been added.



With a refreshing orange flavour

NoordCode Complete Collagen Orange contains a natural orange flavour, which gives the collagen powder a refreshing orange taste for drinks and meals. This flavour pairs well with water, tea, or smoothies.


NoordCode Complete Collagen is also available without added flavour. In that case, the collagen powder has a slightly tart taste of acerola and glycine.


*Disclaimer: Our supplements are trusted and selected by practitioners. Legislation limits the information we can share. For complete details, please refer to a medical library.

product.title: E-Lyte - 473.18 ml | Body Bio
product.description:
Elyte mimics electrolyte levels in the body for optimal hydration. Formulated with the three ingredients you need to bring electrolytes back to the perfect pH balance - Sodium, Potassium and Magnesium.

In 1984 the founder began to make elyte in his bathtub after realizing that there was nothing on the market that truly mimicked the needs of the human body. Since then, elyte has become a best seller for anyone looking for deeper hydration without all the “junk,” or fake sweet flavor found in most electrolyte products.

BodyBio elyte is the perfect combination of sodium, potassium and magnesium.
Most electrolyte concentrates are formulated specifically for professional athletes and contain levels of sodium and sugar that are way too high for daily use. That’s why we are happy to introduce elyte with more potassium, less sodium, and no sugar to mimic human blood and give the body exactly what it needs!

  • Magnesium contributes to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue
  • Magnesium contributes to normal muscle function
  • Magnesium has a role in the process of cell division
  • Magnesium contributes to normal psychological function
  • Magnesium contributes to normal protein synthesis
  • Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of normal bones & teeth
  • Magnesium contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism
  • Magnesium contributes to electrolyte balance
  • Magnesium contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system
  • Potassium contributes to normal muscle function
  • Potassium contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system
  • Potassium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood pressure
Pro-tip:

Replace that afternoon coffee with elyte for a brain and body boost sans sleepless nights.

product.title: Organic Pure Whey - 650g | NoordCode
product.description:
NoordCode Pure Whey is organically produced, pure whey protein concentrate. The milk comes from grass-fed cows grazing in the Alps. 80% protein. For muscle maintenance, growth and recovery.

Grass-fed, free-grazing cows from the Alps
The milk for NoordCode Pure Whey comes from cows that graze in the Alps. The cows eat only grass or grass products from pastures that have never been exposed to pesticides. They are raised according to organic guidelines and receive no hormones or antibiotics. As a result, the milk is of the highest quality.

Only whey protein, with no additives or flavours
Pure Whey contains only whey protein concentrate, as the name says. It contains no flavours or other additives. This makes it a versatile product that you can use in whatever way you like.

Soft processing without irradiation
NoordCode Pure Whey is prepared using gentle heating without irradiation. This keeps as much protein as possible intact while making the whey protein concentrate food-safe.

product.description:
Cryptolepis Supreme™ is a food supplement containing Cryptolepis sanguinolenta, a botanical traditionally used in West African herbal practice.

The root naturally contains alkaloids including cryptolepine together with other constituents characteristic of the species. This capsule format presents the botanical as a focused single-ingredient preparation.

This formulation is produced without unnecessary additives and is intended for use as part of a varied and balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

The root and rhizome naturally contain triterpene glycosides, phenolic acids, and other constituents characteristic of the species. This capsule format presents black cohosh as a focused single-botanical preparation.

This formulation is produced without unnecessary additives and is intended for use as part of a varied and balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

product.title: MegaPre Dairy-Free - 180 Capsules | Microbiome Labs
product.description:
This dairy-free MegaPre™ option is the same Precision Prebiotic™ supplement you know and love


MegaPre™ DF contains oligosaccharides (medium-chain carbohydrates) that can't be digested by humans but instead target keystone species known as secondary degraders.


Primary degraders feed on bulkier fibers (like cellulose, resistant starches, and inulin) and later convert them into products like oligosaccharides.


The oligosaccharides in MegaPre™ have been derived from organic green and gold kiwifruit and non-GMO corn cob

product.title: Optimal Adrenal - 90 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
Discontinued.

Optimal Adrenal by Seeking Health provides a complex of 14 pure nutrients for optimal adrenal support, including vitamin c, zinc, and pantothenic acid (vitamin B5).

The rest of the powerful ingredients are a variety of plant extracts and herbal support which may help to maintain a healthy immune response, mood, and healthy stress levels. Constant stress can deplete the adrenal glands, which in turn may disrupt energy production and healthy nervous system function. Optimal Adrenal may support the body's healthy response to stress and help promote a sense of calmness and balance.

Pantothenic acid is an essential part of the body's ability to produce certain stress hormones. It is believed that when the body is required to produce these hormones in response to prolonged periods of stress, the body becomes depleted of this important B vitamin and its stores must be replenished.

Ashwagandha, also known as winter cherry, is a herb that has been used to promote vitality, longevity, and energy in Ayurvedic medicine. The active compounds in ashwagandha provide a wide range of benefits and may help support healthy immune function, healthy mood, balanced stress levels, and normal thyroid function. These compounds, known as withanolides, may help support the body's natural ability to withstand stress.

Siberian ginseng and Rhodiola root are traditionally used in Russia and Scandinavian countries as "adaptogens," or compounds that may help support the body's healthy stress response. These herbs may help support energy levels and a feeling of focus or clarity, without causing overstimulation.

Cordyceps is a fungus closely related to mushrooms that contains polysaccharides thought to help support healthy, sustained energy levels and cellular health.
