product.title: Gut Nutrients (Peach Flavour) (Formerly Optimal GI Plus Peach) - 232g | Seeking Health
product.description:
Why Choose Gut Nutrients?†

• Powerful herb and nutrient blend supports gut health

• L-glutamine supports gut lining health and normal repair

• Supports healthy digestion and bowel motility


Who Needs Gut Nutrients?

Your patient or client's gut health sets the stage for their overall health. Ensuring healthy digestion and absorption of nutrients is also one of the most effective things they can do for their immune function.


An unhealthy gut can contribute to digestive issues such as bloating, constipation, diarrhea, and malabsorption. Moreover, many diseases of modern society are thought to be rooted in a leaky gut.

If intestinal barrier function becomes compromised, it can trigger the ongoing activation of the immune system and inflammation. With over 60% of the immune system located in the gut lining, a healthy digestive system is also critical for immune health.


The gastrointestinal (GI) tract requires more than probiotics to support healthy digestion.

product.title: Pre-Workout Nutrients - 302 g | Seeking Health
product.description:
Who Needs Pre-Workout Nutrients?


For years, we've known that regular physical exercise is essential to optimal health. It's not just about looking good; it's about feeling fantastic. Exercise has been proven to enhance your mood, improve sleep, help with weight management, and so much more.

However, the type of exercise matters and it’s not just about cardio anymore. The importance of weight training and building lean muscle mass has been gaining traction, and for good reason.

You reach peak muscle mass around age 30. That's why it's crucial for those under 30 to start building muscle now. After that, you slowly start to lose your muscle mass at an average of 0.8% per year. The older you get, the faster that number climbs.
Lifting weights isn’t just for bodybuilders, and maintaining muscle isn't about looking jacked. It's the key to staying active, preserving mobility, and avoiding injuries as you age.

Whether you're a seasoned athlete or just starting your fitness journey, Pre-Workout Nutrients is designed to give you the edge you need to achieve your goals.†

product.description: MakeWell's pioneering S-Acetyl-Glutathione 300 supplement features an innovative, pure acetylated glutathione formula. Glutathione, a critical antioxidant, is vital for numerous bodily functions and is scientificallyrecognised for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.S-Acetyl Glutathione (SAG) offers enhanced stability and absorption compared to regular GSH. Chemically altered with an added acetyl group on the sulfur atom, SAG remains intact through the digestive system and is directly absorbed by cells, providing superior bioavailability. As a prodrug, SAG converts into active intracellular GSH, ensuring maximum efficacy in combating oxidative stress and supporting overall health. Research shows that SAG is more stable in blood plasma than regular Glutathione and can increase intracellular GSH levels, offering robust antioxidant defence and support for various health-related areas.

product.title: Augmented NAC - 90 Capsules | AUGMENTED NAC
product.description:
Augmented NAC is a potentiated version of N-Acetylcysteine. N-Acetylcysteine (NAC) is a well-known derivative of the amino acid cysteine, valued for its role as a stable and convenient source of this important building block within the body.

As a precursor to cysteine, NAC is involved in normal metabolic processes and contributes to the body’s natural biochemical pathways related to protein synthesis. Amino acids like cysteine play a fundamental role in maintaining the structure and function of cells throughout the body.

NAC has been widely used in food supplements due to its stability and ease of use compared to other forms of cysteine. This makes it a practical choice for those looking to include this amino acid as part of their daily nutritional intake.

🧬 A foundational amino acid approach

Amino acids are essential components of proteins and are involved in a wide range of physiological processes. NAC provides a reliable and consistent way to supplement cysteine intake, particularly in modern lifestyles where dietary patterns may vary.

By delivering cysteine in a stable form, NAC supplements are commonly included in routines focused on maintaining overall nutritional balance.

⚙️ Designed for consistency and convenience

NAC is typically used in structured supplementation routines where consistency is key. Its stable form allows for easy dosing and integration into daily habits without complexity.

Whether used alongside other nutrients or as part of a broader nutritional strategy, NAC offers a straightforward way to support amino acid intake.

🌿 Clean and simple formulation

High-quality NAC supplements are designed with simplicity in mind:

  • Pure NAC as a source of cysteine
  • Easy-to-dose format for daily use
  • Suitable for inclusion in structured routines
  • No unnecessary complexity

🧠 A practical addition to your routine

NAC is often chosen by individuals who are looking to complement their diet with specific amino acids. As part of a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle, it can be integrated into daily routines with ease.

product.title: EstroProtect - 60 Capsules | Amy Myers MD
product.description:
What Are Xenoestrogens?

Our modern environment is FULL of chemicals that act as xenoestrogens. Xenoestrogens are chemicals and compounds from outside of the body, then when ingested or absorbed, act as weak estrogens in the body. Not to be confused with phytoestrogens from food that sometimes have health benefits, xenoestrogens are found in everyday personal care products, cookware, plastics, flame retardants applied to mattresses and furniture, and, in general, almost everywhere else you can imagine! We ingest and absorb xenoestrogens every single time we smell chemical fumes, handle receipts from the grocery or department store, drink out of plastic bottles, eat out of plastic or styrofoam storage containers… even sleeping on your 10 year old or brand new memory foam mattress exposes you to vast quantities of these insidious chemicals.

How Do You Avoid Xenoestrogens?

What can you do about xenoestrogens? While avoiding all xenoestrogens is virtually impossible, changing your diet and lifestyle has a huge impact! Switching to natural personal care products, choosing organic fruits and vegetables as well as sourcing protein from animals raised without chemicals, hormones, and antibiotics can all help. Using cookware made with clean materials, choosing to have your purchase receipt emailed to you or not printed at all, avoiding all plastics, and investing in a latex mattress and flame retardant free furniture are also all excellent steps toward eliminating xenoestrogens from your daily life.

EstroProtect is the perfect formula for you if you:

  • Use beauty & body care products with parabens, phthalates, or “fragrance”
  • Eat or drink out of plastic bottles or containers

Fight Estrogen Dominance With EstroProtect


If you are dealing with estrogen dominance, look no further than EstroProtect. In women, estrogen dominance is characterized by having a distinct imbalance between estrogen and progesterone. This can cause a variety of uncomfortable symptoms, especially before and during your menstrual cycle. My EstroProtect formula helps your body strike a balance between estrogen and progesterone by supporting the elimination of excess estrogen and healthy estrogen metabolism.

Address Estrogen Dominance to Support Healthy Menstruation

If you’re having uncomfortable menstrual cycles every month, it’s time to do something about it! Painful and uncomfortable menstrual cycles can be caused by a variety of conditions. When they’re caused by estrogen dominance, thankfully, lifestyle modifications can help a great deal! Besides avoiding endocrine disrupting chemicals, eating more cruciferous vegetables, and exercising, EstroProtect can help your body detoxify.

  • Milkthistle supports liver health, contributes to the detoxifying potential of the liver, helps to protect the liver which in turn maintain the liver function and addtionaly promote the digestion and the body´s purification.*
  • Vitex helps to maintain a physiological well-being during the menstrual cycle, contributes to the female hormonal balance during clymaterium and contributes to relieve the menopause symptoms.**

The main benefit of taking additional Bacillus subtilis is a 100% survivability in the digestive tract


Long before the days of antibiotics, Bacillus subtilis was used as a powerful probiotic treatment for many digestive symptoms, including traveller’s diarrhoea and acute diarrhoea in children. By the mid-1900s, cheap antibiotics began to replace this probiotic in the US markets in the interest of cutting healthcare costs. However, the rest of the world continues to use Bacillus subtilis for a variety of GI symptoms.

product.title: HistaGest-DAO - 60 Capsules | Designs For Health
product.description:
HistaGest‑DAO™ provides supplemental diamine oxidase(DAO), the enzyme responsible for breaking down food‑derived histamine.

Each tablet provides 20,000 histamine‑degrading units of DAO from porcinekidney extract to promote the breakdown of dietaryhistamines.* HistaGest‑DAO™ is formulated withgastro‑resistant, coated tablets with delayed‑releasetechnology that allows the DAO enzyme to reach thesmall intestine where it performs its action.Histamine is a vital compound synthesized from the essential amino acid histidine. Histamine is produced in the body and resides in various tissues, including the liver, lungs, intestine, heart, pancreas, and various other organs.Histamine is primarily stored and released by certain immune cells, but also by a variety of other cells, in response to an injury or in the presence of foreign substances. It is also present in all foods in the diet in various degrees. Common histamine‑rich food sources include fermented foods such as sauerkraut, vinegar, yogurt, alcoholic beverages, fish, cured meats and cheese,and certain fruits and vegetables (e.g., ripe bananas,citrus, spinach, and tomatoes).DAO is present in the gut and its main function is to metabolize ingested dietary histamines. Reduced DAO activity may result in higher levels of histamine being absorbed through the small intestine and accumulating in the blood.

product.description:
Lanto Sinus Probiotic Powder is a probiotic supplement.


WHAT IS THE SINUS MICROBIOME?


The sinus microbiome is the community of microbes (bacteria,viruses, fungi) that live in the sinuses. The sinus microbialcommunity can become disrupted and imbalanced (dysbiosis)from illnesses, allergies, or antibiotics. 


WHAT IS LACTOBACILLUS SAKEI?


Lactobacillus sakei is a keystone bacteria found in thesinuses of healthy humans (those without sinusitis),but diminished or absent in those with chronic sinusitis. Introducing Lactobacillus sakei into the nose and mouth can multiply the population. Studies also find Lactobacillus sakei in the digestivesystem of healthy adults. Some foods naturally containLactobacillus sakei as well, including fermentedkimchi and sauerkraut.

product.title: Dr. Shade's The One - 100ml | Quicksilver Scientific
MegaPre - 180 Capsules | Microbiome Labs
product.description:
MegaPre™ contains oligosaccharides (medium-chain carbohydrates) that can't be digested by humans but instead target keystone species known as secondary degraders.


Primary degraders feed on bulkier fibers (like cellulose, resistant starches, and inulin) and later convert them into products like oligosaccharides.


These complex fibers are important because they can feed beneficial bacteria.For this reason, we decided to skip the first step and instead provide the “good” gut microbes with the intermediate byproducts needed to produce beneficial short-chain fatty acids (SCFAs), like butyrate.


The oligosaccharides in MegaPre™ have been derived from organic green and gold kiwifruit, non-GMO corn cob, and cow‘s milk (rBST-free).

Microbiome Labs also has dairy-free formula—MegaPre™ DF.

product.title: MegaMucosa - 180 Capsules | Microbiome Labs
product.description:
MegaMucosa contains a blend of five specifically selected amino acids and bioflavonoids.

The mucosal system is a very important part of the human immune system. Not many people think of mucus as being protective, but it is the main interface between the human body and the outside world. The mucosal system contains 150 times more surface area than skin, which makes it one of the most important immune barriers. The health of the mucosa determines how the body interacts with antigens; therefore, the integrity of the intestinal mucosa can dictate overall immune function.


There are four key amino acids that play an important role in the production of intestinal mucosa include: L-proline, L-serine, L-cysteine, and L-threonine. These four amino acids have been shown to increase mucin2 production.. MicrobiomeX® is a natural citrus extract rich in polyphenols.

product.title: Paleo Protein Unflavored - 20 Servings | Amy Myers MD
product.description:
Whether you’re looking to increase your daily protein intake or want to support your gut health, this delicious blend can help you.

Grass-fed, collagen-based protein with a full amino acid profile

  • Clean & AIP-Compliant – One of the few AIP-friendly protein powders, free from gluten, dairy, sugar, grains, corn, and legumes, making it ideal for autoimmune and anti-inflammatory diets.
  • High-Quality Protein & Collagen – Provides grass-fed, pasture-raised protein per serving, hydrolyzed for enhanced absorption and easy mixing, and rich in collagen peptides.
  • Packed with Glutamine, Glycine, and Proline.
  • Bone Broth Benefits Without the Hassle – Delivers the nutritional benefits of bone broth in a convenient powder form—no crockpot required.

Who It’s For
Paleo Protein is essential for those who are invested in supporting their gut health with a formula that enhances absorption, easily and effectively.


What is Paleo Protein made of?
Paleo Protein is made from hydrolyzed bovine collagen that comes from happy, pasture-raised cows that graze on fresh green fields in the sunshine. These animals are raised with love and care and are never given unnecessary drugs such as antibiotics, arsenic-based growth promoters, or hormones. They are grass-fed and never fed GMOs, such as genetically modified corn and soy meal.


What time of day should I take Paleo Protein?
Paleo Protein is perfect any time of the day. While Dr. Myers likes it in her morning smoothies, you can enjoy it at all times of the day. Whether you’re mixing it into your morning coffee, into shakes for dessert, or adding it to soups and stews for an extra collagen kick, you’ll find that it’s great around the clock.


Is Paleo Protein safe for pregnant women, breastfeeding mothers, and children?
While many moms and dads tell me they give Paleo Protein to their kids, I always recommend speaking with your child’s pediatrician or nutritionist if you have concerns about any of the ingredients or adjusting the dosing for them. And, as always, I recommend reaching out to your physician, midwife, or other qualified healthcare practitioner if you have any concerns before using it while pregnant or breastfeeding.


Is Paleo Protein damaged by heat?
All proteins are damaged by high heat to some extent. Proteins are long chains of amino acids bound together. High heat can potentially fold and warp the amino acid chains into new shapes and structures called amines that may be unusable by the body, or even harmful. This is why you should avoid charring or overcooking meat. The proteins and peptides in my Paleo Protein Unflavored are quite stable at moderately high temps, so adding it to a hot cup of tea or coffee, or baking it at low temps (below 300F) will not denature it too much.


Can I take Paleo Protein if I’m allergic to tree nuts?
Paleo Protein contains MCT oil derived from coconuts. Scientifically speaking, coconuts are not tree nuts—they are in fact fruits classified as a “drupe.” Other drupes include palm fruit, peaches, berries, plums, and apricots. However, because the FDA has lumped coconuts in a group with other tree nuts for labeling purposes, we are required to list them as a potential allergen. In fact, true coconut allergy is actually extremely rare with only a few cases reported in the medical literature. If you have a diagnosed tree nut allergy, please speak with your healthcare provider before consuming any products containing coconut.


How come there are fewer scoops in my pouch than the number listed on the label?
The listed amount of scoops per pouch is an approximation and can vary based on personal use such as how full you make your scoops, spilling it, how well you scrape out the pouch, etc. While the number listed is an approximation, it shouldn't vary considerably versus what you get.


The Myers Way® Paleo Protein is a clean, AIP-friendly protein powder with highly absorbable grass-fed collagen protein per serving.

product.description:
Serretia is one of the world’s strongest serrapeptase supplements with a minimum activity of 250,000 SPU’s per dose. This miracle enzyme has the ability to support healthy sinuses while promoting swift recovery from injury and/or overexertion from exercise. If you ever experience any of the following, then Serretia may be just what you need:

  • Slowed recovery*
  • Sinus pressure or congestion
  • Joint discomfort of muscle soreness*

*From over-exertion during exercise


SERRETIA® SUPPORTS

  • Bone and Joint Health
  • Lung and Sinus Function
  • Healthy Scar Tissue Formation

HOW IT WORKS

Serretia operates by breaking down excessive proteins, including fibrin and injured tissue, that accumulate in the body due to overexertion. This enzymatic action focuses on digesting these proteins to facilitate the natural healing process.


THE IMPACT

Unlike many treatments that only mask the symptoms associated with overexertion, systemic enzymes like Serretia offer a more fundamental solution. By supporting the breakdown of detrimental proteins, Serretia helps ensure a normal recovery time and enhances the body’s overall healing capabilities, providing active individuals with a significant improvement in post-exertion recovery.

product.description:
Today’s active lifestyles and changing dietary practices often lead to nutrient deficiencies, lower energy levels, and poor health trajectories.

Vital Nutrients Once Daily Multivitamin is a clean and easy-to-take, one-per-day multivitamin specifically formulated to provide essential nutrients needed for a healthy lifestyle and help fill the nutrient gaps in the daily diet. This single-capsule serving is designed for overall wellness and contains 19 vitamins and minerals as well as additional nutrients for cellular energy, eye health, and antioxidant support for heart health.

product.description:
HOW ELECTROLYTES WORK: ENERGY, HYDRATION & CELLULAR HEALTH

Getting the absolute most from every workout means optimizing. It’s what BodyHealth products do. A key factor in any workout is hydration, which means keeping your body stocked with the crucial minerals that allow your body to utilize the water you drink.

Electrolytes are critical before, during, and after a workout to achieve the stamina, power, and performance of a true athlete.  Hydration is more than just water and electrolytes. A real hydration drink should be a complete solution and include what you need to recover, so you can not only perform at your peak levels but get recharged in time for the next workout. This performance cycle is so important that those who make it a habit of supplementing at the right times with the right products get the edge on those who do not. And that edge can make the difference in your splits, your times, and your speed.  

We’ve developed PERFECT AMINO™ Electrolytes to optimize your hydration. It’s more than just another electrolyte drink – it’s a complete electrolyte with PERFECT AMINO™ .

product.title: Perfect Amino Tablet - 300 Tablets|BodyHealth
product.description:
What PerfectAmino Tablets Do For YOU

  • Provides the eight essential amino acids for protein synthesis that your body MUST get from dietary sources.
  • It is the most effective protein supplement 
  • Is an excellent source of protein with virtually zero calories.


Reasons You Should be Using PerfectAmino Every Single Day.

Essential amino acids that we get from foods (meat, eggs, beans, and nuts) must be digested before they're available to muscles, tissues, and cells.

For a variety of reasons, the digestive process is not perfect. Aging, stress (both physical and emotional), gastrointestinal imbalances, unhealthy dietary choices, and the use of medications all get in the way of the body's ability to enzymatically metabolize and process foods and render their essential amino acids bioavailable.

Since PerfectAmino provides a vegetable-based trove of all eight essential amino acids in their pure, elemental form, no digestion is required.

PerfectAmino is very quickly absorbed.

Even if your digestive system were perfect, it would take several hours for your body to be able to utilize the amino acids it has processed and release them into the bloodstream.

When taken on its own, PerfectAmino is absorbed into the bloodstream within 23 minutes.


PerfectAmino is perfectly formulated.

PerfectAmino is a comprehensive formula featuring a unique combination of all eight essential amino acids (50% of which are branched-chain amino acids, or BCAAs). This formula is so complete that it could serve as your sole source of protein, although we recommend it as a super-supplement to a healthy diet. If you consumed only BCAAs or natural plant proteins (which don't have optimal levels of ALL the essential amino acids required by your cells and systems), your health—and performance—would be impacted.*


Humans evolved hunting and eating whole animals as food. However, in modern times, we primarily eat animal flesh, which is high in the inflammatory amino acid, methionine, and low in supportive amino acids, glycine, and proline (found in tendons, ligaments, and organs).

6. PerfectAmino helps maintain muscle mass.

Age and training stress contribute to lean muscle loss. Since PerfectAmino is perfectly balanced and 99% utilized by the body, almost everyone can maintain high levels of the essential amino acids responsible for muscular growth and recovery, regardless of their age or how much they train.

PerfectAmino can take the place of excess protein and support weight management. Each 6.5-gram serving of PerfectAmino (5 tablets) is equivalent to approximately 40 grams of whey, collagen, or soy protein, yet contains only a few calories.  Additionally, since the product is not digested or metabolized, you can take it before high-intensity interval training, intermittent fasting, or cold therapy.

PerfectAmino is super-convenient.

Take 5-10 tablets first thing in the morning, before a workout, after a workout, before bed, or any time you feel a hunger craving coming on during a fast. PerfectAmino is ideal on an empty stomach but can be taken at any point in the day that works for you.

10. PerfectAmino can help everyone!

product.title: Organic Collagen Protein Bar (Vanilla Cashew) - 12 Bars | NoordCode
product.description:
Why choose the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew?


After a year of testing, tasting and perfecting, it’s finally here: the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew. A bar that meets the highest standards we set for ourselves — down to the last detail.

  • Protein bar made exclusively from unprocessed ingredients Fully organic
  • High protein content: 21 g per 60 g bar
  • Collagen from 100% grass-fed European beef bone broth powder
  • High-quality plant-based proteins from peas, rice and almonds
  • Healthy fats from organic cashew nuts
  • Sweetened with raw, single origin acacia honey
  • High fibre content from nuts and organic inulin
  • Flavoured with bourbon vanilla
  • Free from artificial ingredients and pesticides
  • Free from gluten, lactose and GMOs
  • No stevia or sugar alcohols
  • Gentle on the gut, even for the most sensitive individuals

Why NoordCode?

Thrive today, age better tomorrow is our wish for everyone!

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.


There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices.


Thrive today, age better tomorrow is our wish for everyone!

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices. 


The many benefits of the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew


The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew was primarily designed as a nutritious, tasty snack. Thanks to its nutritional profile, the bar is an excellent choice as:

  • An unprocessed alternative to traditional protein and snack bars
  • A protein-rich snack after a workoutA satisfying and delicious treat between meals
  • A complete bar for a quick meal on the go
  • A suitable option for those avoiding dairy, gluten and soy

21 g protein per bar

Its high protein content makes this bar perfect as a post-workout snack.


Proteins contribute to muscle growth and recovery after exercise maintenance of muscle mass maintenance of strong bones


4 high-quality protein sources

The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew contains proteins from four sources:


  • collagen from organic, 100% grass-fed beef bone broth
  • organic pea protein
  • organic rice protein
  • organic almond protein


These four protein sources ensure a balanced intake of amino acids. The bars contain no whey protein or other dairy-based proteins, making them suitable for those with a dairy intolerance.


Collagen from organic, 100% grass-fed European beef bone broth

Bone broth is an excellent source of collagen — especially types I and III — and other bone-supporting nutrients. The beef bone broth is made from organic, 100% grass-fed European cattle. The bones are gently simmered and the broth is dehydrated to preserve the nutrients. The bone broth powder is Halal certified.


Gently processed plant-based proteins

The organic almond, pea and rice proteins are extracted using a gentle process. No chemicals or additives are used to purify the pea and rice proteins. The final purified protein powder is obtained through steam drying.


The almond protein is mechanically separated from the oils without heat or solvents and micronised using nitrogen. Throughout the process, the temperature remains low to keep nutrients intact.Independent laboratory testing confirms that the protein powders are free from heavy metals and other contaminants.


Healthy fats from organic nuts

Healthy fats are an excellent source of energy. They enhance the flavour and, together with protein and fibre, provide long-lasting satiety and steady energy. The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew contains cashew nuts for a balanced profile of saturated and unsaturated fats.


Natural sweetener: raw single origin acacia honey

Our decision to create a complete, functional protein bar ruled out the use of stevia and sugar alcohols (xylitol, erythritol) as sweeteners. Both are commonly found in low-carb bars. While sugar alcohols are often marketed as ‘natural’, they can cause digestive issues for some. Stevia is also widely used as a ‘natural’ option, but many people experience a bitter aftertaste.


Instead, NoordCode chooses raw, single origin acacia honey as a natural sweetener. This provides balanced sweetness, improved texture and a higher nutrient density. The natural, unrefined sugars also offer energy — especially helpful when enjoying the bar as a snack or post-workout.


Optimised amount of organic, natural prebiotic fibres

Prebiotic fibres are a great addition to any snack bar to support fibre intake, satiety, and gut health. However, too much can cause problems — which is often the case with low-carb or keto bars.


NoordCode has carefully balanced the amount of prebiotic inulin fibres so the bar is suitable for people with sensitive digestion. The Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew offers a modest amount of organic inulin to support digestion.

Vanilla Cashew flavour

The flavour of the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew comes from unprocessed ingredients, with no added sweeteners or flavourings. The bar has a mildly sweet vanilla taste, thanks to bourbon vanilla. It combines the best of all worlds: great taste, nutritious ingredients, and a satisfying treat.

Available in multiple flavours:

  • Hazelnut Cacao
  • Vanilla Cashew

Premium organic ingredients with no compromises

The Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew contains only organic, fresh ingredients.

  • No pesticides used in ingredient production
  • No irradiation to extend shelf life
  • No GMO ingredients
  • No additives or binders to improve texture
  • No preservatives or artificial flavours and sweeteners

Enjoy our Organic Collagen Protein Bar Vanilla Cashew with confidence in the quality and health of its ingredients.

product.title: Performance Forest Berries Electrolytes | NoordCode
product.description:
Why NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries?

  • Ready-to-use electrolyte drink mix with sodium, potassium, magnesium, chloride and trace minerals.
    • Water balance
    • Muscle function
    • Nerve function and psychological function
    • Normal blood pressure
  • Electrolytes in highly bioavailable forms.
    • 1000 mg sodium and 1500 mg chloride from unrefined sea salt.
    • 400 mg potassium from potassium citrate.
    • 100 mg magnesium and trace minerals from Aquamin™ magnesium citrate.
  • Suitable for sports, sauna use and fasting.
  • Well-researched mineral ratio.
  • Top-quality ingredients of natural origin.
  • With refreshing forest berries flavour.
  • Sugar-free.
  • Negligible amount of carbohydrates per serving.
  • No artificial or unnecessary additives.
  • Dissolves easily.
  • Suitable for keto, paleo, vegan diets and fasting.
  • Controlled for contaminants.

1 Magnesium

2 Potassium

Why NoordCode?

Thrive today, age better tomorrow is our wish for everyone!

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.


There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices.


Update to Performance Electrolytes

We redeveloped ‘Electrolytes Forest Berries’ into ‘Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries’ based on customer feedback. The updated formula provides:

  • More magnesium: 100 mg instead of 76 mg.
  • Better absorbable magnesium in the form of magnesium citrate.
  • Same flavour, just less sour.
  • Same number of servings (31), but in a smaller jar to use less plastic.

The importance of electrolytes

Electrolytes are charged particles that perform essential functions in the body. Common electrolytes include sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium and chloride. You ingest them through food and lose them via sweat and urine. They can also be supplemented with a food supplement.

When to use NoordCode Performance Electrolytes

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is suitable in the following situations:

  • When you sweat a lot, such as during a sauna session, exercise, or hot weather.

    • You lose both water and electrolytes through sweat. Replenish both to maintain your water balance.

  • When following a low-carb or ketogenic diet.
    • The body retains more salt when you eat carbohydrates daily. On a low-carb diet, you lose electrolytes more quickly.
  • When eating a diet rich in fresh foods with little added salt.
    • Processed foods often contain added salt. When cooking with fresh ingredients, you may not add enough salt.
  • During (water) fasting.
    • It is wise to take electrolytes during fasting. This helps support your energy levels and may reduce fatigue.

In these situations, it is important to monitor your electrolyte intake. An electrolyte supplement helps you do this in a convenient and tasty way.

Optimal electrolyte ratio

The composition of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes SForest Berries is:

  • 1000 mg sodium (no RI)
  • 1500 mg chloride (188% RI)
  • 400 mg potassium (20% RI)
  • 100 mg magnesium (27% RI)
  • Trace minerals

NoordCode based this electrolyte ratio on the following factors.

Focus on sodium and chloride replenishment

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is designed to replenish sodium and chloride. These are the electrolytes most lost through sweat and urine. Sodium and chloride together form salt (sodium chloride). They can therefore be easily replenished through salt.


Each serving of Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries delivers 1000 mg sodium (no RI) and 1500 mg chloride (188% RI). This dosage is suitable to replace lost electrolytes or increase salt intake.


NoordCode uses unrefined sea salt as a source of sodium and chloride. This sea salt is carefully washed to remove impurities and microplastics.

400 mg potassium as a supplement to a varied diet

Potassium is an important electrolyte that helps maintain healthy blood pressure. Health organisations such as EFSA and WHO recommend a sodium to potassium ratio of 1:1 or 1:2.

Potassium is abundant in fresh plant-based foods, such as fruits, potatoes, meat, avocado and leafy greens. NoordCode assumes a varied diet with plant-based foods and selected a dosage of 400 mg potassium, 20% of the reference intake.Potassium citrate is recommended by nutrition scientists for its high absorption rate.

100 mg highly bioavailable magnesium

Magnesium is important for normal nerve and muscle function, among others. You mainly get it from leafy greens, nuts and seeds.


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries provides 100 mg magnesium, 27% of the reference intake. The chosen source is Aquamin™ magnesium citrate, derived from sea minerals.Magnesium citrate is a highly bioavailable form of magnesium. Aquamin™ also contains trace minerals.


Controlled for contaminants


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is tested for contaminants.


Electrolyte drink mix with Forest Berries flavour

The fresh flavour of forest berries comes from natural flavours and is sweetened with stevia.

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries contains no sugar and very few carbohydrates. The calories per serving are so low that they don't interfere with (water) fasting. It is as clean as can be and free from allergens and GMOs. This makes it ideal for a ketogenic or low-carb diet.


Other NoordCode Performance Electrolytes flavours


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is available in different flavours:


  • Lemon Orange
  • Strawberry Cherry
  • Unflavoured


European alternative to LMNT Recharge Electrolytes


The best-known and most popular electrolyte drink mix is LMNT Recharge. Unfortunately, LMNT no longer delivers to Europe. NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is the European alternative to LMNT Electrolytes.


Benefits of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes


The minerals in NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries provide the following benefits:


Energy


  • Magnesium supports energy levels.
  • Magnesium helps reduce tiredness and fatigue.


Muscle and nervous system function


  • Potassium and magnesium are important for normal muscle function.
  • Potassium and magnesium support the normal function of nerve cells.
  • Magnesium plays a role in signal transmission between (nerve) cells.
  • Magnesium contributes to normal mental performance.


Blood pressure and water balance


  • Potassium helps maintain normal blood pressure.
  • Magnesium supports a normal balance of water and mineral levels in the body.


Other benefits


  • Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of strong bones and teeth.
  • Magnesium plays a role in tissue growth and development.
  • Magnesium helps build body protein.
  • Chloride contributes to normal digestion by production of hydrochloric acid in the stomach

Electrolytes for daily use


Depending on your daily salt intake, you may not always need a high-sodium electrolyte mix. That’s why NoordCode also offers Daily Electrolytes. This mix contains less sodium and is only mildly acidic, making it suitable for daily use.


NoordCode Daily Electrolytes is available in different flavours:

  • Berries – a hint of berries
  • Cucumber Mint – a hint of cucumber and mint
  • Passionfruit Papaya – a hint of tropical fruit

product.title: Creatine PRO| NoordCode
product.description:
creatine is a small peptide that the body produces naturally and is found abundantly in muscles. You can also obtain it from food, especially meat products.

Creatine is the building block for phosphocreatine, an energy-carrying molecule. Phosphocreatine serves as an energy reserve that cells use during intense exertion. 95% of phosphocreatine is found in skeletal muscles, where quick energy delivery is most needed. A higher creatine intake leads to higher phosphocreatine levels in muscles.

Your body’s own production and dietary intake provide enough creatine to meet your regular needs.

Creatine is a popular supplement for athletes and is very popular!

After muscles, the brain contains the second-highest concentration of creatine. This has sparked interest in the effects of creatine supplementation on cognitive performance. Research into the effects on cognitive function and mental health is still ongoing.

The most researched and effective form of supplement is creatine monohydrate. Creatine monohydrate is known for its excellent absorption at doses up to 10 grams. With a serving of 3-5 grams, your intestines will absorb 99% of the creatine.

Creapure® creatine monohydrate with AstraGin®

NoordCode Creatine Pro is a fundamental supplement that supports sports training and helps you get more out of your supplement stack and nutrition. It consists of two ingredients: Creapure® creatine monohydrate and the herbal extract AstraGin®.

Creatine monohydrate is the most studied and effective form of creatine, and Creapure® is the purest version available.

The unique herbal extract AstraGin® has been clinically studied for its effects on nutrient absorption.

Creapure® vs generic creatine monohydrate

Creapure® is the purest (99.9%) creatine monohydrate available. Alzchem Trostberg GmbH produces Creapure® in a specialised facility in Germany. The production is carefully controlled from start to finish, with very strict manufacturing and quality standards. Every batch is tested for by-products such as creatinine, dicyandiamide (DCD), and dihydrotriazine (DHT). Thanks to the sarcosinate and cyanamide production method, DCD is just 10 ppm (parts per million), and DHT is undetectable.

Creatine made using a water-based production process

Standard creatine is often made via chemical reactions with hydrochloric acid or sulphuric acid. These acids play a role in the traditional production process of creatine monohydrate. Although this method does not leave acid residues in the final product, these chemicals are part of the production.
In contrast, Creapure® uses a patented process without acids, with water as the base. As a result, Creapure® contains minimal impurities and is considered one of the purest forms on the market.

Creapure® is produced without the use of animal products, making it suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Creapure® is also Halal and Kosher certified.

Generic creatine monohydrate is sourced from China. Due to less rigorous quality control, more by-products are likely present, making it a cheaper option.

About AstraGin®

AstraGin® is a special extract from the roots of Astragalus membranaceus and Panax notoginseng, made by NuLiv Science. Astragalus and Panax notoginseng are herbs traditionally used in Chinese herbal medicine.

AstraGin®has been clinically studied for its effects on nutrient absorption in the intestines.

AstraGin® works best in combination with food and other supplements. For example, AstraGin® helps enhance the absorption of protein powders in your sports supplement stack.

NZVT certified

NoordCode Creatine Pro is certified by NZVT, the Dutch Security System for Dietary Supplements in Elite Sports. Every batch is tested to ensure it does not (unintentionally) contain doping substances. Supplements with the NZVT certification are guaranteed free of doping substances, allowing top athletes to use them with confidence.


Additionally, Creapure® is listed on the Cologne List, a German initiative similar to NZVT, which checks every batch for the absence of doping substances.

  • Creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high intensity exercise

product.title: Performance Lemon Orange Electrolytes | NoordCode
product.description:
Why NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange?

  • Ready-to-use electrolyte drink mix with sodium, potassium, magnesium, chloride and trace minerals.
    • Water balance
    • Muscle function
    • Nerve function and psychological function
    • Normal blood pressure
  • Electrolytes in highly bioavailable forms.
    • 1000 mg sodium and 1500 mg chloride from unrefined sea salt.
    • 400 mg potassium from potassium citrate.
    • 100 mg magnesium and trace minerals from Aquamin™ magnesium citrate.
  • Suitable for sports, sauna use and fasting.
  • Well-researched mineral ratio.
  • Top-quality ingredients of natural origin.
  • With refreshing Lemon Orange flavour.
  • Sugar-free.
  • Negligible amount of carbohydrates per serving.
  • No artificial or unnecessary additives.
  • Dissolves easily.
  • Suitable for keto, paleo, vegan diets and fasting.
  • Controlled for contaminants.

1 Magnesium

2 Potassium

Why NoordCode?

Thrive today, age better tomorrow is our wish for everyone!

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.


There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices.


Update to Performance Electrolytes

We redeveloped ‘Electrolytes Lemon Orange’ into ‘Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange’ based on customer feedback. The updated formula provides:

  • More magnesium: 100 mg instead of 76 mg.
  • Better absorbable magnesium in the form of magnesium citrate.
  • Same flavour, just less sour.
  • Same number of servings (31), but in a smaller jar to use less plastic.

The importance of electrolytes

Electrolytes are charged particles that perform essential functions in the body. Common electrolytes include sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium and chloride. You ingest them through food and lose them via sweat and urine. They can also be supplemented with a food supplement.

When to use NoordCode Performance Electrolytes

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange is suitable in the following situations:

  • When you sweat a lot, such as during a sauna session, exercise, or hot weather.

    • You lose both water and electrolytes through sweat. Replenish both to maintain your water balance.

  • When following a low-carb or ketogenic diet.
    • The body retains more salt when you eat carbohydrates daily. On a low-carb diet, you lose electrolytes more quickly.
  • When eating a diet rich in fresh foods with little added salt.
    • Processed foods often contain added salt. When cooking with fresh ingredients, you may not add enough salt.
  • During (water) fasting.
    • It is wise to take electrolytes during fasting. This helps support your energy levels and may reduce fatigue.

In these situations, it is important to monitor your electrolyte intake. An electrolyte supplement helps you do this in a convenient and tasty way.

Optimal electrolyte ratio

The composition of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange is:

  • 1000 mg sodium (no RI)
  • 1500 mg chloride (188% RI)
  • 400 mg potassium (20% RI)
  • 100 mg magnesium (27% RI)
  • Trace minerals

NoordCode based this electrolyte ratio on the following factors.

Focus on sodium and chloride replenishment

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange is designed to replenish sodium and chloride. These are the electrolytes most lost through sweat and urine. Sodium and chloride together form salt (sodium chloride). They can therefore be easily replenished through salt.


Each serving of Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange delivers 1000 mg sodium (no RI) and 1500 mg chloride (188% RI). This dosage is suitable to replace lost electrolytes or increase salt intake.


NoordCode uses unrefined sea salt as a source of sodium and chloride. This sea salt is carefully washed to remove impurities and microplastics.

400 mg potassium as a supplement to a varied diet

Potassium is an important electrolyte that helps maintain healthy blood pressure. Health organisations such as EFSA and WHO recommend a sodium to potassium ratio of 1:1 or 1:2.

Potassium is abundant in fresh plant-based foods, such as fruits, potatoes, meat, avocado and leafy greens. NoordCode assumes a varied diet with plant-based foods and selected a dosage of 400 mg potassium, 20% of the reference intake.Potassium citrate is recommended by nutrition scientists for its high absorption rate.

100 mg highly bioavailable magnesium

Magnesium is important for normal nerve and muscle function, among others. You mainly get it from leafy greens, nuts and seeds.


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange provides 100 mg magnesium, 27% of the reference intake. The chosen source is Aquamin™ magnesium citrate, derived from sea minerals.Magnesium citrate is a highly bioavailable form of magnesium. Aquamin™ also contains trace minerals.


Controlled for contaminants


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange is tested for contaminants.


Electrolyte drink mix with Lemon Orange flavour

The fresh flavour of Lemon Orange comes from natural flavours and is sweetened with stevia.

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange contains no sugar and very few carbohydrates. The calories per serving are so low that they don't interfere with (water) fasting. It is as clean as can be and free from allergens and GMOs. This makes it ideal for a ketogenic or low-carb diet.


Other NoordCode Performance Electrolytes flavours


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is available in different flavours:


  • Forest Berries
  • Strawberry Cherry
  • Unflavoured


European alternative to LMNT Recharge Electrolytes


The best-known and most popular electrolyte drink mix is LMNT Recharge. Unfortunately, LMNT no longer delivers to Europe. NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is the European alternative to LMNT Electrolytes.


Benefits of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes


The minerals in NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange provide the following benefits:


Energy


  • Magnesium supports energy levels.
  • Magnesium helps reduce tiredness and fatigue.


Muscle and nervous system function


  • Potassium and magnesium are important for normal muscle function.
  • Potassium and magnesium support the normal function of nerve cells.
  • Magnesium plays a role in signal transmission between (nerve) cells.
  • Magnesium contributes to normal mental performance.


Blood pressure and water balance


  • Potassium helps maintain normal blood pressure.
  • Magnesium supports a normal balance of water and mineral levels in the body.


Other benefits


  • Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of strong bones and teeth.
  • Magnesium plays a role in tissue growth and development.
  • Magnesium helps build body protein.
  • Chloride contributes to normal digestion by production of hydrochloric acid in the stomach

Electrolytes for daily use


Depending on your daily salt intake, you may not always need a high-sodium electrolyte mix. That’s why NoordCode also offers Daily Electrolytes. This mix contains less sodium and is only mildly acidic, making it suitable for daily use.


NoordCode Daily Electrolytes is available in different flavours:

  • Berries – a hint of berries
  • Cucumber Mint – a hint of cucumber and mint
  • Passionfruit Papaya – a hint of tropical fruit

With all the health benefits of pure, fresh, high-quality concentrated fish oil, it gives you more omega-3s in every serving. Available in both liquid and soft gels.

All Nordic Naturals’ fish oil products are offered in the triglyceride molecular form—the form naturally found in fish, and the form your body most easily absorbs.* Everything we make is non-GMO and third-party tested, surpassing the strictest international standards for purity and freshness. Nordic Naturals fish oils are Friend of the Sea (FOS) certified and sustainably made in a zero-waste facility powered by biofuel.

product.title: Multivitamin One Sensitive - 45 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
Get what you need; avoid what you don’t.

Many nutrients are not well tolerated by those who are more sensitive, have high inflammatory markers, or have certain health conditions.

  • Do you require lower amounts of key nutrients (like B6, folate, or B12)?
  • Do you require higher amounts of key nutrients (like B1)?
  • Do you need to avoid certain nutrients (like folate, B12, calcium, iron, or iodine)?
  • Are you sensitive to various herbs (like ashwagandha, nettle, or milk thistle)?

Multivitamin One Sensitive is a strategically formulated multivitamin that allows sensitive individuals to get what they need - and avoid what they don’t.†

Multivitamin One Sensitive is FREE from:

  • Herbs
  • Calcium
  • Copper
  • Folate
  • Iodine
  • Iron
  • Manganese
  • Vitamin B12
  • Methylated nutrients

    • Before Multivitamin One Sensitive, individuals with various nutrient sensitivities had to take numerous capsules from multiple different bottles in order to tailor to their specific needs. Now, it’s easy to get what you need in just 1 capsule while avoiding what you don’t want.

product.title: Organic Collagen Protein Bar (Hazelnut Cacao) - 12 Bars | NoordCode
product.description:
Why choose the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao?

  • Protein bar made exclusively from unprocessed ingredients
  • Fully organic
  • High protein content: 19 g per 60 g bar
  • Collagen from 100% grass-fed European beef bone broth powder
  • High-quality plant-based proteins from peas and rice
  • Healthy fats from organic hazelnuts
  • Sweetened with raw, single-origin acacia honey
  • High fibre content from nuts and organic inulin
  • Flavoured with non-alkalised cacao
  • Free from artificial ingredients and pesticides
  • Free from gluten, lactose and GMOs
  • No stevia or sugar alcohols
  • Gentle on the gut, even for the most sensitive individuals

Why NoordCode?

Thrive today, age better tomorrow is our wish for everyone!

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.


There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices.


The many benefits of the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao


The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao was primarily designed as a nutritious, tasty snack. Thanks to its nutritional profile, the bar is an excellent choice as:


  • An unprocessed alternative to traditional protein and snack bars
  • A protein-rich snack after a workout
  • A satisfying and delicious treat between meals
  • A complete bar for a quick meal on the go
  • A suitable option for those avoiding dairy, gluten and soy

19 g protein per bar

Its high protein content makes this bar perfect as a post-workout snack. Proteins contribute to: muscle growth and recovery after exercise maintenance of muscle mass maintenance of strong bones

3 high-quality protein sources

The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao contains proteins from three sources: collagen from organic, 100% grass-fed beef bone brothorganic pea protein organic rice protein. These three protein sources ensure a balanced intake of amino acids. The bars contain no whey protein or other dairy-based proteins, making them suitable for those with a dairy intolerance.


Collagen from organic, 100% grass-fed European beef bone broth

Bone broth is an excellent source of collagen, especially types I and III, and other bone-supporting nutrients. The beef bone broth is made from organic, 100% grass-fed European cattle. The bones are slowly simmered and the broth is dehydrated to preserve the nutrients. The bone broth powder is Halal certified.

Gently processed plant-based proteins

The organic pea and rice proteins are extracted using a gentle process. No chemicals or additives are used to purify the proteins. The final purified protein powder is obtained via steam drying. Independent laboratory testing confirms that the protein powders are free from heavy metals and other contaminants.

Healthy fats from organic nuts

Healthy fats are an excellent source of energy. They enrich the flavour and, together with protein and fibre, provide a long-lasting feeling of fullness and stable energy levels. The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao contains hazelnuts for a balanced profile of saturated and unsaturated fats.

Natural sweetener: raw single origin acacia honey

Our decision to create a truly complete protein bar ruled out the use of stevia and sugar alcohols (xylitol, erythritol) as sweeteners. These are commonly found in low-carb bars. Although sugar alcohols are often presented as ‘natural’, they can cause issues for some people. Stevia, while also promoted as a ‘natural’ sweetener, is known to leave a bitter aftertaste for many. Instead, NoordCode chooses raw, single origin acacia honey as a natural sweetener. This offers balanced sweetness, improved texture and a higher nutrient density. The natural, unrefined sugars also provide energy — especially useful as a snack or post-workout fuel.

Optimized amount of organic, natural prebiotic fibres

Prebiotic fibres are a great addition to any snack bar for fibre content, satiety and digestive health support. However, too much is never a good thing — which is often the case with low-carb or keto bars.N oordCode has carefully balanced the amount of prebiotic inulin fibres so the bar is suitable for people with sensitive digestion. The Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao offers a moderate amount of organic inulin to support healthy digestion.

Hazelnut Cacao flavour

The flavour of the Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao comes from unprocessed whole foods, with no added sweeteners or flavourings. The bar has a chocolate-hazelnut taste reminiscent of chocolate hazelnut spread. This combines the best of all worlds: great taste, nutritious ingredients, and a satisfying treat.


Available in multiple flavours

The NoordCode Organic Collagen Protein Bar is available in multiple flavours:

  • Hazelnut Cacao
  • Vanilla Cashew

Premium organic ingredients with no compromises

The Organic Collagen Protein Bar Hazelnut Cacao contains only organic, fresh ingredients.

  • No pesticides used during ingredient production
  • No irradiation to extend shelf lifeNo GMO ingredients
  • No additives or binders to improve texture

product.title: Performance Forest Berries Electrolytes - 30 sachets| NoordCode
product.description:
• Ready-to-use electrolyte drink mix with sodium, potassium, magnesium, chloride and trace minerals.
    • Water balance
    • Muscle function
    • Nerve function and psychological function
    • Normal blood pressure
  • Electrolytes in highly bioavailable forms.
    • 1000 mg sodium and 1500 mg chloride from unrefined sea salt.
    • 400 mg potassium from potassium citrate.
    • 100 mg magnesium and trace minerals from Aquamin™ magnesium citrate.
  • In convenient single serving sachets.
  • Suitable for sports, sauna use and fasting.
  • Well-researched mineral ratio.
  • Top-quality ingredients of natural origin.
  • With refreshing forest berries flavour.
  • Sugar-free.
  • Negligible amount of carbohydrates per serving.
  • No artificial or unnecessary additives.
  • Dissolves easily.
  • Suitable for keto, paleo, vegan diets and fasting.
  • Controlled for heavy metals.

Feeling your best now and in the future starts with what you put into your body. Many foods lack quality and are poorly absorbed. This means your body doesn’t get what it truly needs. NoordCode bridges this gap, providing a strong foundation for your nutrition – European, pure, effective, and precisely tailored to support your body.

There are no shortcuts to your best self. Your lifestyle plays a big role in how you feel every day. That's why you get ‘The Code’ for free with every NoordCode product: a course to help you make healthier, conscious choices.


Update to Performance Electrolytes

We redeveloped ‘Electrolytes Forest Berries’ into ‘Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries’ based on customer feedback. The updated formula provides:

  • More magnesium: 100 mg instead of 76 mg.
  • Better absorbable magnesium in the form of magnesium citrate.
  • Same flavour, just less sour.
  • Same number of servings (31), but in a smaller jar to use less plastic.

The importance of electrolytes

Electrolytes are charged particles that perform essential functions in the body. Common electrolytes include sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium and chloride. You ingest them through food and lose them via sweat and urine. They can also be supplemented with a food supplement.

When to use NoordCode Performance Electrolytes

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is suitable in the following situations:

  • When you sweat a lot, such as during a sauna session, exercise, or hot weather.

    • You lose both water and electrolytes through sweat. Replenish both to maintain your water balance.

  • When following a low-carb or ketogenic diet.
    • The body retains more salt when you eat carbohydrates daily. On a low-carb diet, you lose electrolytes more quickly.
  • When eating a diet rich in fresh foods with little added salt.
    • Processed foods often contain added salt. When cooking with fresh ingredients, you may not add enough salt.
  • During (water) fasting.
    • It is wise to take electrolytes during fasting. This helps support your energy levels and may reduce fatigue.

In these situations, it is important to monitor your electrolyte intake. An electrolyte supplement helps you do this in a convenient and tasty way.

Optimal electrolyte ratio

The composition of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes SForest Berries is:

  • 1000 mg sodium (no RI)
  • 1500 mg chloride (188% RI)
  • 400 mg potassium (20% RI)
  • 100 mg magnesium (27% RI)
  • Trace minerals

NoordCode based this electrolyte ratio on the following factors.

Focus on sodium and chloride replenishment

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is designed to replenish sodium and chloride. These are the electrolytes most lost through sweat and urine. Sodium and chloride together form salt (sodium chloride). They can therefore be easily replenished through salt.


Each serving of Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries delivers 1000 mg sodium (no RI) and 1500 mg chloride (188% RI). This dosage is suitable to replace lost electrolytes or increase salt intake.


NoordCode uses unrefined sea salt as a source of sodium and chloride. This sea salt is carefully washed to remove impurities and microplastics.

400 mg potassium as a supplement to a varied diet

Potassium is an important electrolyte that helps maintain healthy blood pressure. Health organisations such as EFSA and WHO recommend a sodium to potassium ratio of 1:1 or 1:2.

Potassium is abundant in fresh plant-based foods, such as fruits, potatoes, meat, avocado and leafy greens. NoordCode assumes a varied diet with plant-based foods and selected a dosage of 400 mg potassium, 20% of the reference intake.Potassium citrate is recommended by nutrition scientists for its high absorption rate.

100 mg highly bioavailable magnesium

Magnesium is important for normal nerve and muscle function, among others. You mainly get it from leafy greens, nuts and seeds.


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries provides 100 mg magnesium, 27% of the reference intake. The chosen source is Aquamin™ magnesium citrate, derived from sea minerals.Magnesium citrate is a highly bioavailable form of magnesium. Aquamin™ also contains trace minerals.


Controlled for heavy metals

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is tested for heavy metals


Reduced acidity

NoordCode pays close attention to the acidity of the electrolyte drink when developing the flavour. Most flavoured sports and electrolyte drinks are highly acidic, which makes them less suitable for consumption throughout the day. NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries is not as highly acidic as other sports and electrolyte drinks.


Electrolyte drink mix with Forest Berries flavour

The refreshing flavour of forest berries comes from natural flavours and is sweetened with stevia.

NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries contains no sugar and very few carbohydrates. The calories per serving are so low that they don't interfere with (water) fasting. It is as clean as can be and free from allergens and GMOs. This makes it ideal for a ketogenic or low-carb diet.


Convenient single-serve sachets for on the go

Performance Electrolytes Lemon Orange Single Servings come in handy portion sachets. You can easily take them with you and use them anywhere to prepare your electrolyte drink.


NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is available in different flavours and packaging options.


Jars


  • Forest Berries
  • Lemon Orange
  • Strawberry Cherry
  • Unflavoured


Single Serving Sachets


  • Forest Berries
  • Strawberry Cherry


European alternative to LMNT Recharge Electrolytes


The best-known and most popular electrolyte drink mix is LMNT Recharge. Unfortunately, LMNT no longer delivers to Europe. NoordCode Performance Electrolytes is the European alternative to LMNT Electrolytes.


Benefits of NoordCode Performance Electrolytes


The minerals in NoordCode Performance Electrolytes Forest Berries provide the following benefits:


Energy


  • Magnesium supports energy levels.
  • Magnesium helps reduce tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: Biorhythmic Duo Toothpaste - 2x32ml| KarmiCare
product.description:
Karmicare Biorhythmic Duo

An Advanced Oral Care System Aligned with Your Body’s Natural Rhythm

Discover the first toothpaste set designed to work in harmony with your biological clock. Karmicare Biorhythmic Duo isn’t just toothpaste – it’s a complete, scientifically grounded system for mindful oral care.

Did you know your mouth has different needs at night than during the day? 

With two unique formulas for morning and evening, Karmicare supports not just your oral health, but also your daily performance, focus, and overnight recovery.

The system is most effective when both formulas are used together — complementing each other in function, action, and timing, just like your body does.

Karmicare is a premium Belgian label specializing in functional, nootropic-based oral care. It’s trusted by orthomolecular doctors, athletes, and nutritionists — and embraced by a growing community looking for clean ingredients and a holistic approach to health.

Why Choose Karmicare?

        •        Oral care in sync with your natural biorhythm
        •        Peace of mind – clean, effective formulas without compromise
        •        Enriched with nootropic extracts for focus & calm
        •        Free from hormone-disrupting substances
        •        Leave-on technology for extended efficacy
        •        Precision pump system – hygienic, elegant, and waste-free
        •        Formulated with bioactive minerals and natural ingredients

Karmicare Technology


Developed through the lens of Chronobiology and Certified Leave-On Formulation
        •        No rinsing needed — the formula continues working after brushing
        •        Xylitol helps inhibit harmful bacteria, supports the oral microbiome, and actively reduces plaque and acid formation
        •        Reduces sensitivity by reinforcing and replenishing the tooth surface
        •        Intensive remineralization through targeted delivery of nano hydroxyapatite, penetrating deep into the enamel and dentin layers
        •        Supports natural enamel regeneration
        •        Deep-cleansing action helps prevent plaque buildup
        •        Leaves the tooth surface smooth and nourished
        •        Binds to enamel for long-lasting care
        •        Hygienic pump delivers precise doses with no waste

How to Use

        1.        Pre-rinse: Wet your mouth with water and rinse to remove loose debris.
        2.        Apply 2–4 pumps: 2 pumps provide essential minerals; 4 pumps create a richer foam and stronger taste.
        3.        Brush mindfully: Brush for at least 1–2 minutes using small, circular motions. Focus on one tooth at a time with gentle pressure.
        4.        Do not rinse: Spit out but do not rinse. Leaving Karmicare in the mouth supports enamel remineralization, extends formula activity, and enhances nootropic absorption.
✳ Do not combine with fluoride-based oral care products.

product.title: Amino Complex, Berry - 228g | Thorne
product.description:
Thorne’s Amino Complex

Amino acids are the building blocks of protein. 
Of the 20 amino acids that make up protein, nine are classified as essential amino acids (EAAs), those the body cannot produce itself. Therefore, they must be consumed through diet and supplementation to support the body’s internal production of energy.  

Thorne’s Amino Complex is a comprehensive blend of EAAs, which is high in branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) – a group of amino acids .

Features of Thorne’s Amino Complex:

Available in two flavors - lemon and berry;
Available in bulk powder or individual stick pack servings
NSF Certified for Sport®
Lightly sweetened;
Mixes easily in warm or cold liquid;
Contains flavors and sweeteners derived from natural flavors;

How to take Thorne’s Amino Complex:

Amino Complex is best taken after a workout.
It’s an ideal formula for active individuals, individuals managing calories, or anyone who has difficulty consuming whole foods or protein powders, particularly after heavy exercise.

Because athletes need to know their supplements are trustworthy and compliant, every batch of an NSF Certified for Sport® product is tested for compliance with label claims and to ensure the absence of nearly 300 substances banned by many major athletic organizations.

product.title: Niacinamide- 180 Capsules | Thorne
product.description:
Niacinamide, also known as nicotinamide, is a non-flushing form of vitamin B3. Niacinamide has multiple positive functions in the body, including supporting restful sleep and healthy joint and skin.

It also acts as an antioxidant, inhibiting free radical formation.

Niacinamide has been found to stimulate neurotransmitter receptors in the brain, without binding to the receptor sites, which creates a calming, sedative-like effect. Niacinamide has also been used in support of several dermatological conditions. Niacinamide is not derived from yeast.

This product has been third-party tested and certified to verify what's in the package matches what's on the label and to confirm it contains no unsafe levels of contaminants, such as heavy metals, pesticides, and microorganisms.

product.title: Chromium Picolinate - 60 Capsules | Thorne
product.description:
Refined flour and refined sugar is significantly depleted of chromium. In addition, metabolic stress, strenuous exercise, and pregnancy can all increase chromium needs.

Thorne's Chromium Picolinate provides chromium that is bound to picolinic acid, which facilitates its absorption, so you get chromium's full benefit.
Chromium in the form of picolinate has been widely studied for its support of blood sugar metabolism and insulin sensitivity.

Picolinic acid, a natural mineral chelator produced in the body, is made from the amino acid tryptophan in the liver and kidneys and is transported to the pancreas. During digestion, picolinic acid is secreted from the pancreas into the small intestine.

This product has been third-party tested and certified to verify what's in the package matches what's on the label and to confirm it contains no unsafe levels of contaminants, such as heavy metals, pesticides, and microorganisms.

product.title: L-Glutamine pulver - 407 g| Thorne
product.description:
Thorne's L-Glutamine Powder is NSF Certified for Sport®. Evidence suggests supplemental L-glutamine benefits gastrointestinal health, supports cellular repair and collagen formation after surgery or repair, maintains immune health, and helps restore plasma glutamine levels depleted after periods of physical stress, such as prolonged exhaustive exercise.

L-glutamine is the most prevalent amino acid in the bloodstream. It is found in high concentration in the gastrointestinal tract, which is its greatest user. Various stress factors – such as trauma, infection, malnutrition, chemotherapy, injury, and high-level athletic training – can adversely affect absorption in the small intestine, leading to food allergies. 

Skeletal muscles contain the greatest intracellular concentration of L-glutamine. But that concentration can be adversely affected by various insults, including injury, infection, chronic stress, malnutrition, and glucocorticoid use. Intense exercise lowers blood levels of glutamine, which can remain low if intense training is repeated without adequate recovery. Research indicates L-glutamine supplementation can offset these conditions.

Because athletes need to know their supplements are trustworthy and compliant, every batch of an NSF Certified for Sport® product is tested for compliance with label claims and to ensure the absence of nearly 300 substances banned by many major athletic organizations.

product.title: Methyl-Guard - 180 Capsules | Thorne
product.description:
﻿Supports methylation 

The body's methylation process is key to maintaining a healthy level of homocysteine, as well as to multiple other biochemical processes. Methyl-Guard was the first nutritional supplement on the market to support homocysteine metabolism and healthy methylation using nutrients in their active, tissue-ready forms.


Methylation – the addition of a methyl group (CH3 – one carbon attached to three hydrogens) to another molecule – is an essential and vital biochemical process in the body involved in multiple biochemical pathways involving neurotransmitters, detoxification, cardiovascular health, eye health, muscle health, bone health, and redox balance. A number of specific nutrients are necessary for the process of methylation to occur effectively.


A number of biochemical imbalances that raise the level of homocysteine can be addressed by supplementing with appropriate nutrient cofactors. For example, folic acid (as L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate), vitamin B12 (as methylcobalamin), and betaine (trimethylglycine) help recycle homocysteine to the amino acid methionine, while the recycling of homocysteine into the beneficial amino acids cysteine and taurine is facilitated by pyridoxal 5'-phosphate (the active form of vitamin B6).Studies have shown these nutrients help maintain a normal level of homocysteine in the blood.


Because homocysteine levels can be higher in individuals in which the enzymatic reaction that converts folic acid to the active methyl donor L-5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF) does not function properly, Methyl-Guard contains 400 mcg of active 5-MTHF per capsule.

product.title: Saffron - 60 Capsules | New Roots Herbal
product.description:
﻿Saffron is a spice derived from the dried stigmas and styles of the Crocus sativus flower. The main bioactive compounds in saffron stigmas are: crocins, crocetin, picrocrocin and safranal. In addition, saffron also contains other active components such as carotenoids, zeaxanthin, lycopene, beta-carotene and polysaccharides. Saffron, in addition to its culinary use, has been used in traditional medicine, among other uses, to promote a healthy mood balance.

New Roots Herbal Saffron provides clinically studied saffron (Crocus sativus) stigmas extract (affron™) of the highest quality. Our saffron extract is standardised to 3.5% Lepticrosalides®, by HPLC. Lepticrosalides® is a patented combination of the active substances in saffron: crocin, safranal and picrocrocin.

The quality of affron® lies in its origins, cultivated in fields in Castilla-La Mancha, the selection of the Crocus sativus L. species and the exclusive patented low-temperature extraction process that allows the bioactive compounds to be preserved at a minimal energy cost.


  • Saffron contributes to emotional balance, helps to support the relaxation and maintain a positive mood. Health claim ID 2038 pending European approval.
  • Saffron helps to maintain good comfort before and during menstrual cycle Health claim ID 2251 pending European approval.

Vegan. Ovo-lactovegetarian. Gluten free. Dairy free.

product.title: Melatonin Liquid - 50 ml | New Roots Herbal
product.description:
Melatonin is a hormone naturally synthesised by our body from tryptophan and serotonin, the concentrations of which decrease with age. Melatonin release follows a circadian rhythm: it increases in darkness and decreases in light.


Our liquid melatonin is easy to administer, easy to dose and quickly absorbed, providing 1 mg of melatonin per 9 drops.


HEALTH CLAIMS (EU Regulation 432/2012): Melatonin contributes to the alleviation of subjective feelings of jet lag with a minimum intake of 0,5 mg to be taken close to bedtime on the first day of travel and on the following few days after arrival at the destination; and to the reduction of time taken to fall asleep by consuming 1 mg of melatonin close to bedtime.

product.title: DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™) - 30 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™) - you may receive the old packaging, no change in formulation.

Histamine Digest contains a patented enzyme formula featuring diamine oxidase (DAO).

Normally, an enzyme in your gut breaks down histamine from your diet. This enzyme is called Diamine Oxidase or DAO. Some people, due to genetics or other factors, do not produce enough DAO enzymes. As a result, they may experience uncomfortable symptoms when eating high-histamine foods.

product.description:
odeage Liposomal Multi Amino+ is a comprehensive amino acid and plant-based protein supplement featuring all 9 essential amino acids with liposomal delivery. This plant protein formula is a popular choice among athletes and fitness enthusiasts. It is both a BCAA (branched-chain amino acid) and EAA (essential amino acid) supplement. The body cannot produce essential amino acids, which must be obtained through diet or supplementation.

Codeage Liposomal Multi Amino+ includes all 9 essential amino acids. These amino acids are necessary for the body and must be obtained through diet or supplementation.

This amino acid supplement features a liposomal delivery. It contains L-Leucine, L-Lysine HCL, L-Isoleucine, L-Valine, L-Threonine, L-Phenylalanine, L-Methionine, L-Histidine, L-Cystine, L-Tyrosine, and L-Tryptophan.

Codeage Liposomal Multi Amino+ is vegan, non-GMO, soy-free, dairy-free, and gluten-free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions or sensitivities. It is also free from artificial colors, flavors, and preservatives.

Each bottle of Codeage Liposomal Multi Amino+ contains 30 servings, providing one month supply of amino acids.

Manufactured in the USA with global ingredients, Codeage Liposomal Multi Amino+ is produced in a cGMP-certified facility for quality and purity. A powder format of this formula is also available at this link.
