product.title: Liver GB+ - 60 Capsules | Biocidin Botanicals
product.description: SILIPHOS® MILK THISTLE AND TUDCA FORMULA PROMOTES BILE FLOW AND FAT DIGESTION* SUPPORTS GLP-1 THERAPY*Dietary Supplement | 60 Capsules The level of toxicity in today’s world places unprecedented detoxification demands on our bodies. And environmental toxins are only part of the problem. They are compounded by medications, dysbiosis, poor diet, stress – and, more recently, by the advent of rapid weight loss brought on by GLP-1 therapy.The liver is considered the primary organ of detoxification, and the gallbladder plays an essential supporting role. Together, they metabolize and excrete toxins, through bile, into the small intestine for elimination.When this process is disrupted, detoxification is impaired, and another vital function of bile – fat absorption – is diminished. That means gas, bloating, and nausea. Bile stagnation can even lead to gallstones over time.Even for these modern concerns, answers can often be found in nature.Liver GB+™ is a synergistic two-in-one formula like no other that bolsters the body’s detoxification pathways.* Formulated with traditional botanicals and the bioidentical bile acid TUDCA, Liver GB+™ supports healthy liver and gallbladder function, accelerates detoxification by increasing bile flow, promotes digestion, and may soothe side effects of GLP-1 therapy.*Liver GB+™ is crafted to harness the long-term benefits of optimized detoxification while granting a reprieve from the digestive discomfort common to interrupted bile flow. Clinical Focus: Who’s It For?• Individuals looking to enhance liver detoxification• Individuals prone to indigestion after meals• Those seeking support for GLP-1 therapy side effects• Those with difficulty digesting dietary fat• People on high-fat diets (e.g., Keto, Paleo)• Anyone who has had their gallbladder removed

product.title: Motility Assist - 30 Capsules | Biocidin Botanicals

FUNCTION FOR HEALTHY ELIMINATION*AVAILABLE IN 30 COUNT CAPSULES When constipation is an ongoing issue, the root cause needs to be addressed. Many reach for magnesium, an herbal laxative or even a suppository to alleviate occasional constipation – but what keeps the problem from returning? That’s where botanical regularity formula Motility Assist comes in. Because while all botanicals are natural, they don’t necessarily correct the underlying cause.Motility Assist is a botanical formula that activates peristalsis and improves transit time. It efficiently moves waste through the digestive tract, providing prompt relief from constipation. It also offers long- term root-cause support as it works in the background to heal the gut barrier and support healthy digestive function.*These benefits are the result of a carefully selected blend of research- backed botanicals. The hero ingredient in Motility Assist is Digexin® – a combination of ashwagandha and okra. It’s backed by two double- blind, randomized, placebo-controlled human clinical trials. Other scientifically proven botanical ingredients include Triphala (an ancient and foundational Ayurvedic blend of three herbs), ginger root extract, and fennel seed extract.Motility Assist also addresses the emotional aspects of gut health.* It supports the critically important communication pathway between the gut and brain, increasing production of serotonin – influencing mood, sleep, and overall mental wellness.* Nourishing the Gut-Brain axis with one capsule a day.*Clinical Focus: Who’s It For?• Anyone with constipation seeking support for healthy regularity• Anyone with slowed gastric emptying accompanied by constipation• Those addressing bloating, indigestion, nausea, or gas associated with constipation• People supporting effective daily elimination during a detoxification protocol• Anyone addressing microbial dysbiosis in the small intestine

product.title: B12 Adenosyl Hydroxy - 90 capsules | Pure Encapsulations
product.description:
Adenosyl/Hydroxy B12 offers a unique blend of vitamin B12 , as adenosylcobalamin and hydroxycobalamin. Hydroxycobalamin is a precursor form of vitamin B12 converted in the body's to both methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin. It is similar to cyanocobalamin without the cyanide moiety. Adenosylcobalamin is an activated form similar to methylcobalamin. While methylcobalamin is found in the cytosol of cells and predominates in blood and other fluids, adenosylcobalamin is the major form of vitamin B12 stored in the mitochondria of cellular tissues.

product.title: Milk Thistle Complex - 60 Capsules | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics Milk Thistle Complex is a food supplement formulated with a combination of botanical extracts and nutrients traditionally used to support liver health, digestive function, and normal metabolic processes. The formula combines milk thistle seed extract, artichoke leaf extract, and choline to provide nutritional support for liver function and bile production.

Milk thistle (Silybum marianum) is the primary botanical ingredient and provides silymarin, a group of flavonoids known for their antioxidant properties. Silymarin has been widely studied for its ability to help protect liver cells from oxidative stress and support the liver’s natural detoxification processes. Milk thistle has traditionally been used in herbal medicine for maintaining liver health and supporting the body’s physiological purification functions.

Artichoke leaf extract (Cynara scolymus) is included to support digestive health and liver function. Artichoke contains compounds such as cynarin and flavonoids that are associated with bile production and normal fat digestion. By supporting bile flow, artichoke contributes to digestive processes and helps maintain normal lipid metabolism.

The formula also includes choline in the form of choline bitartrate. Choline contributes to normal lipid metabolism and contributes to the maintenance of normal liver function. In the body, choline can be converted into phosphatidylcholine, which plays an important role in the transport and metabolism of fats, helping prevent the accumulation of triglycerides in the liver.

The combination of milk thistle, artichoke extract, and choline provides complementary support for liver metabolism, digestive processes, and antioxidant protection. The botanical extracts are standardised to help ensure consistent levels of active compounds and reliable potency across batches.

Metagenics Milk Thistle Complex is supplied in capsule form for convenient daily supplementation and controlled dosing.

• Contains milk thistle seed extract providing silymarin
• Includes artichoke leaf extract to support digestion and bile production
• Provides choline which contributes to normal lipid metabolism and normal liver function
• Formulated to support liver health and metabolic processes
• Capsule format for convenient daily supplementation
• Suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets
• Free from gluten, lactose, and soy

product.title: Adaptogenic Herbal Complex - 60 Capsules | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics Adaptogenic Herbal Complex is a food supplement formulated with a blend of standardised botanical extracts. The formula combines extracts of cordyceps, Asian ginseng, and rhodiola—three herbs used in traditional herbal practices and included in modern nutritional formulations.

Adaptogenic herbs is a term commonly used in herbal traditions to describe plants historically associated with use in periods of physical or emotional strain. This formula was previously known as Adreset and retains the same combination of herbal extracts under the updated product name Adaptogenic Herbal Complex.

Cordyceps extract (Paecilomyces hepiali), standardised to cordycepic acids, is included as a source of characteristic compounds naturally present in this mushroom. Cordyceps has a long history of use in traditional herbal practices and is commonly included in food supplements.

Asian ginseng root extract (Panax ginseng), standardised to ginsenosides, is a botanical ingredient widely used in traditional herbal preparations and modern food supplements.

Rhodiola root extract (Rhodiola rosea), standardised to rosavins and salidroside, is another botanical commonly used in traditional herbal preparations and included in food supplements.

The botanical extracts in this formula are standardised to provide consistent levels of key compounds, helping ensure uniform composition between batches. Adaptogenic Herbal Complex is supplied in capsule form for convenient daily supplementation.

In this formulation it is included as both whole root powder and a standardised extract providing gingerols, compounds associated with digestive activity. Ginger has been studied for its effects on gastric emptying and digestive motility.

Artichoke leaf extract (Cynara scolymus) is included to support digestion and the normal functioning of the intestinal tract. Artichoke has traditionally been used in digestive formulations and is associated with supporting bile flow and digestive processes.

The formula also includes N-acetyl-L-carnitine, an amino acid derivative involved in cellular metabolism that may support nerve signalling related to digestive motility and neurotransmitter balance within the gut.

The combination of ginger and artichoke extracts has been investigated in studies assessing gastric motility and digestive comfort, supporting their use in formulations designed for individuals experiencing sluggish digestion or slow intestinal transit.

product.title: Multi Essentials For Women Multivitamin - 30 Tablets | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics Multi Essentials For Women is a comprehensive multivitamin and mineral food supplement formulated to support the daily nutritional needs of women. The formula provides a broad spectrum of essential vitamins, minerals, and targeted botanical extracts. It contains 29 essential nutrients in bioavailable forms.

The formulation includes vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol), the body’s preferred form of vitamin D, together with vitamin K2 (menaquinone-7).

A full spectrum of B vitamins is included in active or body-ready forms. The formula provides folate as 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (5-MTHF) and vitamin B12 as methylcobalamin, forms that can be readily utilised by the body.

The supplement also contains iron in the form of iron bisglycinate. Additional minerals such as zinc, selenium, iodine, and magnesium contribute to immune function, thyroid health, and normal metabolic processes.

In addition to vitamins and minerals, the formula includes plant-based extracts such as broccoli extract and pomegranate extract. 

The supplement is designed as a convenient once-daily tablet and is suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets. It is formulated without gluten, dairy, or soy.

product.title: OmegaGenics SPM - 60 Softgels | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics OmegaGenics SPM is a fish-oil-based food supplement providing omega-3 fatty acids together with specialised lipid compounds derived from EPA (eicosapentaenoic acid) and DHA (docosahexaenoic acid).

SPMs (specialised pro-resolving mediators) are bioactive metabolites formed from omega-3 fatty acids. These compounds are part of the body’s natural biochemical processes.

Although the body can produce these metabolites from dietary omega-3 fatty acids, this conversion involves several enzymatic steps and may vary between individuals.

Each softgel contains concentrated fish oil providing omega-3 fatty acids EPA and DHA together with specific lipid metabolites including 17-HDHA, 18-HEPE, and 14-HDHA, which are derived from EPA and DHA.

The fish oil used in the formulation is sourced from marine fish and is delivered in a softgel capsule designed to protect the oil from oxidation and provide convenient daily use. The formula also includes tocopherol-rich extracts, which help maintain the quality of the oil.

Metagenics OmegaGenics SPM is supplied in softgel capsules and is intended for use as part of a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.


  • Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) intake contributes to the normal visual development of infants up to 12 months of age.
  • Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) maternal intake contributes to the normal development of the eye of the foetus and breastfed infants.
  • DHA contributes to maintenance of normal brain function
  • DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision
  • Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) maternal intake contributes to the normal brain development of the foetus and breastfed infants.
  • DHA and EPA contribute to the maintenance of normal blood triglyceride levels
  • EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart
  • DHA and EPA contribute to the maintenance of normal blood pressure
  • Fish oil supplement enriched with specialised pro-resolving mediators (SPMs)
  • Provides omega-3 fatty acids EPA and DHA together with SPM metabolites

    • Designed to support the body’s natural resolution of inflammation

product.title: MetaDigest HCl Complex - 90 Capsules | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics MetaDigest HCl Complex is a food supplement containing betaine hydrochloride (HCl), digestive enzymes and amino acids. The formula combines betaine hydrochloride with enzymes and amino acids.

Hydrochloric acid is present in the stomach and contributes to the acidic environment in gastric contents. Digestive enzymes are involved in the breakdown of food components during digestion.

The formula contains betaine HCl together with L-glutamic acid HCl and digestive enzymes including protease, papain, bromelain, amylase and lipase.

Papain (derived from papaya) and bromelain (derived from pineapple) are plant enzymes commonly included in digestive enzyme preparations. Additional enzymes such as amylase and lipase are enzymes that act on carbohydrates and fats.

The formula also includes the amino acids taurine and glycine.

MetaDigest HCl Complex is provided in capsule form.

  • Contains betaine HCl (150 mg) and L-glutamic acid HCl (100 mg).
  • Comprehensive Digestive Enzyme Blend: Contains a broad spectrum of enzymes including protease, papain, bromelain, amylase, and lipase
  • Targeted Two-Phase Capsule Technology
  • Formulated in plant-based capsules

product.title: Saw Palmetto + Stinging Nettle Complex - 60 Capsules | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics Saw Palmetto + Stinging Nettle Complex is a food supplement formulated with a blend of botanical extracts, antioxidants, and minerals designed to support prostate health, urinary function, and hormonal balance. The formula combines saw palmetto berry extract and stinging nettle root extract with plant antioxidants and trace minerals to provide comprehensive nutritional support for male reproductive and urinary health, while also being used in certain formulations to support hormonal balance in women.

Saw palmetto (Serenoa repens) is a botanical traditionally used to support male health, particularly prostate and urinary tract function. It is commonly included in nutritional supplements aimed at supporting normal urinary flow and prostate health. Saw palmetto extracts are standardised to fatty acids and have been studied for their interaction with the enzyme 5-alpha-reductase, which converts testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone associated with prostate enlargement and certain hormonal imbalances.

Stinging nettle root (Urtica dioica) has a long history of traditional use in herbal medicine for supporting prostate and urinary health. It is often combined with saw palmetto in formulations designed to support the prostate gland and maintain healthy urinary function.

The formulation also includes a range of nutrients and botanical extracts that provide antioxidant support and contribute to hormonal and cellular health. Zinc contributes to normal testosterone levels in the blood, while selenium and vitamin E contribute to the protection of cells from oxidative stress. Additional plant extracts such as pomegranate, pumpkin seed, flaxseed, maritime pine bark extract, and trans-resveratrol provide polyphenols and antioxidant compounds that help protect cell membranes from oxidative damage.

Lycopene, a carotenoid naturally found in tomatoes, is included as an antioxidant compound commonly studied for its role in protecting cells from oxidative stress.

The supplement is supplied in capsule form for convenient daily supplementation and controlled dosing. The botanical extracts are standardised to provide consistent levels of active compounds, helping ensure consistent potency between batches.

• Contains saw palmetto berry extract standardised to fatty acids
• Provides stinging nettle root extract (Urtica dioica)
• Includes zinc and selenium for hormonal and antioxidant support
• Contains lycopene and botanical antioxidants including pomegranate and resveratrol
• Formulated to support prostate health and normal urinary function
• May also support hormonal balance in women
• Capsule format for convenient daily supplementation
• Free from common allergens such as gluten, dairy, and soy

product.title: Myo-Inositol Powder - 60 Servings | Metagenics
product.description:
Metagenics Myo-Inositol Powder is a food supplement providing myo-inositol, a naturally occurring compound that is present in the body and in foods such as fruits, beans, and grains.

Myo-inositol is a carbohydrate-like molecule that is found in cell membranes and is involved in cellular structures. It also occurs as part of various compounds in the body.

The supplement provides 2000 mg of myo-inositol per serving in a powder form that dissolves easily in water, juice, or other beverages. The powder format allows flexible dosing and convenient use.

Myo-inositol has been the subject of scientific research in relation to various biological processes. It is commonly included in food supplements.

Because dietary sources may provide varying amounts of myo-inositol, supplementation can be used as an additional source. The formula contains minimal additional ingredients.

Metagenics Myo-Inositol Powder is supplied as a powdered supplement with 60 servings per container and is suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets.


• Provides 2000 mg of myo-inositol per serving
• Powder format that mixes easily with water or juice
• Contains myo-inositol
• 60 servings per container
• Suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets

product.title: Optimal Focus 60 g | Seeking Health
product.description: Acetylcholine is your brain’s #1 calming neurotransmitter—by far. Your brain utilizes acetylcholine to help you learn new things, recall names and places, keep your memory sharp, your focus dialed in, your bowels moving, and even support healthy muscle movement. It’s also a key player in REM sleep, which is the time your brain processes and stores new information.1 When acetylcholine levels drop, you may feel mentally foggy, struggle to focus, have difficulty learning new things, experience constipation, move more rigidly, forget names and events, or notice that you don’t dream as much.2 Several factors can contribute to low acetylcholine, including aging, inflammation, genetics (like the APOE4 gene), vegetarian or vegan diets, and exposure to certain pesticides.3,4 Some health conditions, such as difficulty with hyperactivity, dyslexia, spectrum disorder, myasthenia gravis, and dementia, have also been linked to low acetylcholine levels.5, 21 Keeping this neurotransmitter in balance is essential for staying sharp and supporting long-term brain health! The positive effects of supporting healthy acetylcholine levels are subtle: paying attention, focusing, listening, not switching or interrupting, being calmer in prior stressful situations, better sleep, and the ability to learn more easily.

product.title: NuaDHA 1000 - 90 Capsules | Nua Biological
product.description:
NuaDHA 1000: Precision DHA, Without Compromise

Omega-3 fatty acids are not interchangeable. DHA and EPA differ fundamentally in structure and function—and when DHA intake is the focus, not all omega-3 supplements are equivalent.

Many products combine DHA and EPA in standardised ratios. However, when a higher intake of DHA is preferred, formulation specificity becomes a key consideration.


NuaDHA 1000 delivers 1,000 mg of DHA per serving—a high-strength intake designed for those who prioritise DHA.

DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal brain function and the maintenance of normal vision, with a beneficial effect obtained at a daily intake of 250 mg DHA (EU Regulation (EC) No 1924/2006).

DHA is a major fatty acid present in the brain and retina, where it forms part of their normal structure.

Why NuaDHA 1000 stands apart

  • Focused DHA formulation — no generic DHA/EPA blends
  • High-strength intake — 1,000 mg DHA per serving
  • Defined composition through advanced purification
  • No unnecessary additives

NUA applies a purification and concentration process to isolate DHA, delivering a product with a consistent and verified composition.

Move beyond generic omega-3

For those who choose DHA specifically, composition matters. NuaDHA 1000 provides a concentrated source of DHA in a format designed for convenient daily use as part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.


  • Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) intake contributes to the normal visual development of infants up to 12 months of age.
  • Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) maternal intake contributes to the normal development of the eye of the foetus and breastfed infants.

  • DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision

Lutein and zeaxanthin are carotenoids naturally present in plant sources, while taurine is an amino acid and R-lipoic acid is included in its naturally occurring form. Vitamins and minerals such as vitamin C, vitamin E, zinc, and copper are included as part of the overall composition.

Products of this type are often incorporated into dietary routines that include a combination of plant-derived compounds, vitamins, and trace elements.

Nuantiox® Vision is provided in capsule format for convenient daily use and is intended for use as part of a varied and balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

product.title: DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™) - 90 Capsules | Seeking Health
product.description:
DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™) - you may receive the old packaging, no change in formulation.

Histamine Digest contains a patented enzyme formula featuring diamine oxidase (DAO). 

Normally, an enzyme in your gut breaks down histamine from your diet. This enzyme is called Diamine Oxidase or DAO. Some people, due to genetics or other factors, do not produce enough DAO enzymes. As a result, they may experience uncomfortable symptoms when eating high-histamine foods.

product.title: Hifas-Intima oral | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Intimate health is closely linked to the balance of your vaginal microbiota and immune system. Everyday factors such as stress, hormonal fluctuations, antibiotics, and lifestyle habits can disrupt this delicate ecosystem—often leading to discomfort, imbalance, and recurrent issues.

This is where Hifas-INTIMA stands out.

Hifas-INTIMA is an advanced synbiotic formula designed to support intimate well-being from within. By combining targeted probiotic strains, prebiotic fibres, functional mushrooms, and essential nutrients, this expertly formulated supplement helps maintain the natural balance of the vaginal microbiota and supports overall intimate comfort.

At the core of the formula are carefully selected Lactobacillus strains, known to play a key role in maintaining a healthy vaginal environment. These beneficial bacteria are combined with prebiotic inulin, helping to nourish and support the growth of good bacteria.

The formula is further enhanced with D-Mannose and Salvia lavandulifolia extract, alongside Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum)—a functional mushroom valued for its rich profile of bioactive compounds. Together, these ingredients provide a well-rounded approach to daily intimate care.

To complete the formulation, Hifas-INTIMA includes vitamins A and C, which contribute to essential physiological functions. Vitamin A supports the maintenance of normal mucous membranes, while vitamin C contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system—both key elements in maintaining intimate health.

Support Intimate Balance from Within

-Includes D-Mannose and botanical extracts for daily support
-With vitamin A to support the maintenance of normal mucous membranes
-With vitamin C to support normal immune system function
-Designed to support intimate comfort and overall well-being
-Vegan-friendly and clean formulation
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards

Why Hifas-INTIMA is Different

The vaginal microbiota plays a crucial role in maintaining comfort and balance. Hifas-INTIMA provides selected Lactobacillus strains alongside prebiotics to help support a balanced internal environment.

Synbiotic Approach

By combining probiotics (beneficial bacteria) with prebiotics (their nourishment), this formula supports a more effective and sustained microbiota balance.

Multi-Ingredient Synergy

Hifas-INTIMA goes beyond probiotics alone—combining mushrooms, plant extracts, and nutrients to provide a holistic approach to intimate wellness.

Unique Features of Hifas-INTIMA

-Provides billions of live cultures per capsule
-Combination of Lactobacillus strains selected for microbiota support
-Includes Reishi fruiting body for additional bioactive compounds
-With D-Mannose and Salvia extract for complementary support

Benefits of Hifas-INTIMA

-Helps maintain a balanced vaginal microbiota
-Supports normal immune system function (vitamin C)
-Contributes to the maintenance of normal mucous membranes (vitamin A)

The Science Behind Hifas-INTIMA

The vaginal microbiota is dominated by beneficial Lactobacillus species, which help maintain a balanced environment. Supporting these bacteria through targeted supplementation can help maintain this natural equilibrium.

Hifas-INTIMA combines multiple strains of Lactobacillus with prebiotic fibres, plant compounds, and functional mushroom extracts, creating a synergistic formula designed to support intimate health from multiple angles.

The inclusion of vitamins A and C ensures scientifically recognised contributions to mucosal integrity and immune function—key pillars of long-term intimate well-being.

Support your intimate health with Hifas-INTIMA—a complete, science-backed formula designed to help you feel balanced, comfortable, and confident every day.

These are combined with targeted Lactobacillus probiotics to complement microbiota balance—an important factor in maintaining a healthy intimate environment.

The formula is further enriched with vitamins A, C, D, and E, along with zinc and selenium, which contribute to the normal functioning of the immune system, protection of cells from oxidative stress, and maintenance of mucous membranes—key elements in supporting the body’s natural barrier against external challenges.

Support Intimate & Immune Defence Naturally

Why Papilozumib is Different

Support During Viral Challenges (Including HPV)

product.title: Mico-Cord 60 refill | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Full Description

Maintaining energy, stamina, and overall vitality can be challenging—especially with modern lifestyles that demand constant physical and mental performance. However, not all energy supplements deliver real results. Many rely on stimulants or low-quality ingredients that provide only short-term effects.

This is where Mico Cord stands out.

Mico Cord is a premium, highly concentrated Cordyceps (Cordyceps sinensis) extract, traditionally known as the “energy mushroom.” Used for centuries in Asian practices and increasingly supported by modern research, Cordyceps is valued for its role in supporting energy metabolism, endurance, and overall vitality.

Formulated with both a standardized extract and micronised powder, Mico Cord delivers a full spectrum of bioactive compounds—including beta-glucans, cordycepin, and adenosine—combined with natural acerola vitamin C to support immune function and absorption.


Boost Your Energy Naturally with Mico Cord

-Highly concentrated Cordyceps extract with dual extract + powder formula
-Rich in beta-glucans, cordycepin & bioactive compounds
-Natural source of vitamin C from acerola for immune support
-Supports energy, stamina & physical performance
-Helps maintain vitality and resilience
-Vegan, clean & allergen-free formula
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why Mico Cord is a Game-Changer

Dual-Action Formula for Maximum Effect

Mico Cord combines a standardised 6:1 extract with micronised Cordyceps powder, ensuring both high potency and a complete profile of active compounds.

Natural Energy Support (No Stimulants)

Cordyceps is naturally rich in adenosine, a precursor to ATP (cellular energy), helping support sustained energy production without the crash associated with stimulants.

Enhanced with Acerola Vitamin C

Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system and helps reduce fatigue, supporting overall vitality.


Unique Features of Mico Cord

-Standardised Cordyceps extract from selected Cs-4 strain
-High levels of polysaccharides and bioactive molecules
-Advanced, sustainable extraction process for optimal bioavailability
-Clean formulation free from allergens, GMOs, and unnecessary additives
-Vegan capsules suitable for daily use
-European biotech quality with full traceability


Benefits of Mico Cord

-Supports natural energy production and vitality
-Helps improve physical performance and endurance
-Contributes to reduced fatigue and tiredness
-Supports immune system function
-Promotes overall well-being and resilience


The Science Behind Mico Cord

Cordyceps has been widely studied for its unique compounds, including beta-(1-3)/(1-6)-D-glucans, cordycepin, and adenosine, which are linked to energy metabolism and immune support. Adenosine plays a key role in ATP production, the body’s primary energy currency.

Mico Cord uses a high-quality Cs-4 strain and a carefully controlled extraction process to ensure consistent levels of these bioactive compounds. This guarantees a reliable, potent supplement designed to support daily performance and long-term vitality.


Upgrade your daily routine with Mico Cord and experience natural, sustained energy—powered by one of nature’s most respected functional mushrooms.

product.title: Pro-Flora™ Women’s - 30 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Pro-Flora™ Women’s Probiotic contains a combination of two well-characterised bacterial strains: Lactobacillus rhamnosus GR-1® and Lactobacillus reuteri RC-14®.These selected Lactobacillus strains are naturally occurring bacterial cultures commonly used in food supplements and are part of the human microbiota.Pro-Flora™ Women’s Probiotic provides Lactobacillus rhamnosus GR-1® and Lactobacillus reuteri RC-14® in a convenient daily capsule format, designed for supplementation with live bacterial cultures.

The Indena Phytosome® delivery system addresses this by embedding berberine in a phospholipid matrix alongside pea protein and grape seed extract, enhancing solubility and intestinal absorption compared to conventional berberine preparations.Berbevis® and Indena Phytosome® are registered trademarks of Indena S.p.A., Italy.

product.title: Betaine HCl - 250 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Betaine HCl + Pepsin provides a targeted, high-purity combination of betaine hydrochloride and pepsin designed to integrate cleanly into your daily routine. Traditional lifestyle factors, busy schedules, or the natural aging process often lead individuals to include specialized dietary components alongside their main meals. To support these choices, this supplement delivers a precise, reliable blend of robust ingredients to complement your dietary routine. Every capsule delivers a transparent look at its premium components: pepsin is a naturally occurring enzyme present in the stomach, while betaine hydrochloride is the hydrochloride salt of betaine, a compound found naturally in wholesome foods such as beetroot and wholegrains. This formulation is carefully engineered to be exceptionally well-tolerated and perfectly adapted for consistent use exactly when you need it most. Free from artificial fillers or additives, this straightforward, no-nonsense formulation is ideal for individuals who value absolute ingredient transparency and long-term quality. It serves as a clean, premium addition to your long-term habits, allowing you to navigate full menus and diverse culinary choices with complete confidence.

product.title: Magnesium Glycinate Plus - 120 Tablets | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Magnesium Glycinate Plus is a highly bioavailable magnesium supplement designed to support normal muscle function and the normal functioning of the nervous system, using magnesium in a well-tolerated glycinate form.Magnesium is an essential mineral involved in hundreds of enzymatic processes in the body, including those related to muscle function, nerve signalling, and energy-yielding metabolism. Low magnesium intake or increased demand due to exercise or lifestyle factors can affect these systems.Magnesium glycinate is a chelated form of magnesium bound to the amino acid glycine. This form is popular for its high absorption and gentle effect on the digestive system, making it suitable for consistent use without the gastrointestinal discomfort sometimes associated with other forms of magnesium.Magnesium contributes to normal muscle function, normal psychological function, and the normal functioning of the nervous system, as well as helping to reduce tiredness and fatigue. This formulation is designed to seamlessly complement your daily routine.By contributing to normal muscle function and the normal functioning of the nervous system, magnesium supports the body's everyday processes, making it a practical choice for individuals with active lifestyles or increased physical demand.As a well-absorbed form of magnesium, this formulation supports effective utilisation within the body, making it a practical option for individuals looking to maintain adequate magnesium levels.This formulation is designed to be clean and well tolerated, without artificial additives or fillers, making it suitable for regular use.Magnesium Glycinate Plus is particularly suited to individuals looking to support normal muscle function, the normal functioning of the nervous system, and normal psychological function, especially during periods of increased physical or mental demand.

product.title: Riboflavin - 30 Tablets | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Riboflavin (vitamin B2) is a water-soluble vitamin that functions as a component of coenzymes FMN (flavin mononucleotide) and FAD (flavin adenine dinucleotide), which are involved in normal energy-yielding metabolism.Vitamin B2 contributes to normal metabolic processes as part of enzyme systems involved in the utilisation of nutrients.Vitamin B2 contributes to normal formation of red blood cells and plays a role in the normal functioning of enzyme systems involved in vitamin metabolism.

product.title: K2 + D3 - 60 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Vitamin K2 + D3 is a targeted vitamin K2 and vitamin D3 supplement designed to support the maintenance of normal bones, normal calcium absorption, and normal blood clotting, combining clinically studied MenaQ7® vitamin K2 with high-potency vitamin D3. Adequate calcium intake alone is not sufficient for optimal bone health and physical wellbeing. The body must be able to properly absorb, transport, and utilise calcium to maintain balance across different systems. Vitamin D contributes to the normal absorption and utilisation of calcium from the diet, helping maintain normal blood calcium levels. Vitamin K2, in the form of MenaQ7®, plays a complementary role by contributing to the maintenance of normal bones, working alongside your body's natural processes.Vitamin K is essential for directing calcium to where it is needed most, supporting its appropriate distribution in the body. By contributing to normal bone mineralisation, vitamin K2 supports the body’s natural processes for maintaining a healthy calcium balance. Together, vitamins K2 and D3 work synergistically to support bone strength, blood health, and efficient calcium metabolism, making this combination a key addition to a balanced supplementation routine.MenaQ7® is a clinically studied form of vitamin K2 (menaquinone-7), known for its stability and bioavailability, providing consistent support for vitamin K-dependent processes in the body.This formulation is designed to be clean and well tolerated, without artificial fillers or additives, making it suitable for consistent use. Vitamin K2 + D3 is particularly suited to individuals looking to support bone health, normal blood clotting, and optimal calcium utilisation, especially as part of a long-term health strategy.

product.title: Phosphatidylserine - 60 Softgels | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Phosphatidylserine (PS) is a naturally occurring phospholipid. Like other phospholipids, PS is an important structural component of cell membranes and is found throughout the body. It occurs in relatively high concentrations in the brain and nervous tissues, primarily within the cell membranes of neurons.Phosphatidylserine is widely studied for its role in cellular structure and function and is a naturally occurring constituent of human tissues.Integrative Therapeutics' Phosphatidylserine is derived from sunflower oil and is 100% soy-free. This makes it an excellent choice for individuals seeking a soy-free alternative to traditional phosphatidylserine supplements.

product.title: Magtein® L-Threonate Plus - 90 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Integrative Therapeutics Magtein® L-Threonate Plus features clinically studied Magtein® magnesium L-threonate, combined with vitamins C and D3 to support normal psychological function and the normal functioning of the nervous system. It is formulated with premium, highly bioavailable sources of nutrients to cleanly complement your active lifestyle.This formula delivers a meaningful dose of vitamin C, which contributes to normal psychological function and the normal functioning of the nervous system, in a clean capsule without artificial fillers.Vitamin D contributes to the normal absorption and utilisation of calcium and phosphorus. This combination of magnesium L-threonate and vitamins C and D3 offers a straightforward, clean addition to a structured supplementation routine.(Magtein® is a trademark of Magceutics, Inc. and is distributed exclusively by AIDP, Inc. Magtein® is protected under a family of US patents, pending patents, and is protected worldwide.)

product.title: Detoxication Factors™ - 120 Capsules | Integrative Therapeutics
product.description: Developed to deliver a comprehensive combination of over 30 targeted ingredients, Detoxication Factors is carefully engineered to fit seamlessly into your active everyday routine.This advanced complex delivers essential nutrients, including choline, which contributes to the maintenance of normal liver function. It also contains zinc, selenium, and vitamins C and E, which help protect cells from oxidative stress. It is an excellent choice for everyday nutritional support during busy schedules or periods of increased environmental demand. Formulated without any artificial fillers or additives, this well-tolerated blend is ideal for individuals looking to structurally complement a long-term lifestyle strategy.

product.description: Barrier Complex is a food supplement featuring a blend of botanicals and specialized ingredients, formulated as part of a balanced lifestyle.Brightseed® BIO Gut Core™ and Myoceram® are innovative ingredients used in food supplement formulations focused on digestive and skin nutrition.The formula also contains the amino acid L-glutamine; Gutgard® DGL (a deglycyrrhizinated licorice extract); slippery elm bark; marshmallow root; and N-acetyl glucosamine (NAG).The lemon-lime flavoured powder is easy to mix into water or other beverages for daily use. product.title: Methylated Complex - 90 Capsules | Metagenics
product.description:
Methylated Complex is a food supplement providing a comprehensive blend of methylated B vitamins and related nutrients in capsule form.

The formulation includes bioactive forms of key B vitamins, such as methylfolate (5-MTHF) and methylcobalamin (vitamin B12), alongside other carefully selected cofactors involved in one-carbon metabolism and methylation pathways. Using active forms of these nutrients allows them to be utilised directly by the body without requiring additional conversion steps.

B vitamins contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism, normal psychological function, normal functioning of the nervous system, and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue. Folate contributes to normal amino acid synthesis, normal blood formation, and has a role in the process of cell division.
